Whole_GAM_Pipeline

2025-12-10

#write.csv(Diabetes_df, "Diabetes_df.csv", row.names = FALSE)
library(mgcv)
## Loading required package: nlme
## This is mgcv 1.9-3. For overview type 'help("mgcv-package")'.
#TO RUN USE DIABETES_DF FROM SPLINES OUTPUT (WHETHER TEST or)
#Generate The GAM uisng whichever dataset you provide, if you want separate df, change the variable names
#df1 is without no modification, treating SVI as a linear variable and all other variables as linear
#df2 is with splines for continuous variables and interaction terms
#df3 is with splines for continuous variables, interaction terms, and feature shrinkage
#dfa is with splines for continuous variables and interaction terms and weighted data (the model pays more attention to diabetics since there are fewer of them)

#get the train dataset which includes Diabetes binary
setwd("/scratch/nh2696/Machine_Learning/")
#Diabetes_file_w_outcomes <- c("Diabetes_imputed_train_dataset_1_aligned.csv")

#dfs <- lapply(Diabetes_file_w_outcomes, read.csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
#Diabetes_outcomes_df <- do.call(rbind, dfs)
#Diabetes_df<- c("Diabetes_df.csv")
#dfb <- lapply(Diabetes_df, read.csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
#Diabetes_df <- do.call(rbind, dfb)

#outcome_var<-c("Diabetes_binary") #binary so 0 and 1

#outcome_df <- Diabetes_outcomes_df[, outcome_var]
#Ensure that the Diabetes_df containing the SVI_scaled also includes the Diabetes binary outcome
#Diabetes_imputed_w_outcomes_df=cbind(Diabetes_df,outcome_df)
#names(Diabetes_imputed_w_outcomes_df)[names(Diabetes_imputed_w_outcomes_df) == "outcome_df"] <- "Diabetes_binary"
#Diabetes_df<-Diabetes_imputed_w_outcomes_df
#Create two dataframes that will add columns to hold predicted probabilities based on their model performance
#write.csv(train_Diabetes_df, "train_Diabetes_df.csv", row.names = FALSE)
train_Diabetes_df<- c("train_Diabetes_df.csv")
dfs <- lapply(train_Diabetes_df, read.csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
train_Diabetes_df <- do.call(rbind, dfs)
df_1 <- train_Diabetes_df
df_1_b <- train_Diabetes_df
#SVI and all variables as linear
outcome <- "Diabetes_binary"  # assume 0/1 or Yes/No
svi_var <- "SVI_scaled"

#Other variables
covariates <- c("HighBP", "HighChol", "CholCheck", "BMI", "Smoker",
                "Stroke", "HeartDiseaseorAttack", "PhysActivity",
                "Fruits", "Veggies", "HvyAlcoholConsump", "GenHlth",
                "MentHlth", "PhysHlth", "DiffWalk",
                "Sex", "Age")

#SVI as linear and other variables as linear
formula_str <- paste(outcome, "~", svi_var, "+", paste(covariates, collapse = " + "))

#Fit GAM
gam_model <- gam(as.formula(formula_str),
                 family = binomial(),
                 data = df_1)

#Summary of the model
summary(gam_model)
## 
## Family: binomial 
## Link function: logit 
## 
## Formula:
## Diabetes_binary ~ SVI_scaled + HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + 
##     BMI + Smoker + Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + PhysActivity + 
##     Fruits + Veggies + HvyAlcoholConsump + GenHlth + MentHlth + 
##     PhysHlth + DiffWalk + Sex + Age
## 
## Parametric coefficients:
##                        Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)          -7.3793653  0.0884571 -83.423  < 2e-16 ***
## SVI_scaled           -0.4175934  0.0259639 -16.084  < 2e-16 ***
## HighBP                0.7237563  0.0163243  44.336  < 2e-16 ***
## HighChol              0.5321207  0.0150591  35.336  < 2e-16 ***
## CholCheck             1.1220935  0.0706102  15.891  < 2e-16 ***
## BMI                   0.0544044  0.0009882  55.053  < 2e-16 ***
## Smoker               -0.0142998  0.0146211  -0.978  0.32806    
## Stroke                0.1360488  0.0279068   4.875 1.09e-06 ***
## HeartDiseaseorAttack  0.2184552  0.0198268  11.018  < 2e-16 ***
## PhysActivity         -0.0455241  0.0160199  -2.842  0.00449 ** 
## Fruits               -0.0401776  0.0151636  -2.650  0.00806 ** 
## Veggies              -0.0390044  0.0176187  -2.214  0.02684 *  
## HvyAlcoholConsump    -0.6539377  0.0409800 -15.957  < 2e-16 ***
## GenHlth               0.4905897  0.0089291  54.943  < 2e-16 ***
## MentHlth             -0.0026198  0.0009333  -2.807  0.00500 ** 
## PhysHlth             -0.0045722  0.0008655  -5.282 1.27e-07 ***
## DiffWalk              0.1554996  0.0187811   8.280  < 2e-16 ***
## Sex                   0.2131635  0.0147678  14.434  < 2e-16 ***
## Age                   0.1095020  0.0029767  36.786  < 2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## 
## R-sq.(adj) =  0.158   Deviance explained =   19%
## UBRE = -0.3457  Scale est. = 1         n = 202944
#add predicted probabilities column
df_1$predicted_prob <- predict(gam_model, type = "response")
df_1[[outcome]] <- as.numeric(df_1[[outcome]] == 1)
get_classification_metrics <- function(actual, predicted_prob, threshold = 0.5) {
  #probabilities to class labels based on threshold
  predicted_class <- ifelse(predicted_prob >= threshold, 1, 0)
  
  #confusion matrix
  conf_mat <- table(Predicted = predicted_class, Actual = actual)
  
  #check cells are there
  TP <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["1","1"]), conf_mat["1","1"], 0)
  TN <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["0","0"]), conf_mat["0","0"], 0)
  FP <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["1","0"]), conf_mat["1","0"], 0)
  FN <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["0","1"]), conf_mat["0","1"], 0)
  
  #readout of metrics
  sensitivity <- TP / (TP + FN)        # True Positive Rate
  specificity <- TN / (TN + FP)        # True Negative Rate
  FPR <- FP / (FP + TN)                # False Positive Rate
  FNR <- FN / (FN + TP)                # False Negative Rate
  accuracy <- (TP + TN) / (TP + TN + FP + FN)
  
  metrics <- list(
    confusion_matrix = conf_mat,
    TP = TP, FP = FP, TN = TN, FN = FN,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    FPR = FPR,
    FNR = FNR,
    accuracy = accuracy
  )
  
  return(metrics)
}


actual <- df_1$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_1$predicted_prob

#0.5 threshold
metrics_0.5 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.5)
print(metrics_0.5)
## $confusion_matrix
##          Actual
## Predicted      0      1
##         0 171315  24600
##         1   3350   3679
## 
## $TP
## [1] 3679
## 
## $FP
## [1] 3350
## 
## $TN
## [1] 171315
## 
## $FN
## [1] 24600
## 
## $sensitivity
## [1] 0.1300965
## 
## $specificity
## [1] 0.9808204
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.01917957
## 
## $FNR
## [1] 0.8699035
## 
## $accuracy
## [1] 0.8622773
#0.3 threshold
metrics_0.3 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.3)
print(metrics_0.3)
## $confusion_matrix
##          Actual
## Predicted      0      1
##         0 158692  16798
##         1  15973  11481
## 
## $TP
## [1] 11481
## 
## $FP
## [1] 15973
## 
## $TN
## [1] 158692
## 
## $FN
## [1] 16798
## 
## $sensitivity
## [1] 0.4059903
## 
## $specificity
## [1] 0.9085507
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.09144935
## 
## $FNR
## [1] 0.5940097
## 
## $accuracy
## [1] 0.838522
#Socioeconomic variables are independent (no SVI) and all variables as linear
outcome <- "Diabetes_binary" 

#other variables (inclue income, education, NoDocbcCost_flipped, AnyHealthcare)
covariates <- c("HighBP", "HighChol", "CholCheck", "BMI", "Smoker",
                "Stroke", "HeartDiseaseorAttack", "PhysActivity",
                "Fruits", "Veggies", "HvyAlcoholConsump", "GenHlth",
                "MentHlth", "PhysHlth", "DiffWalk",
                "Sex", "Age", "Income", "NoDocbcCost_flipped", "AnyHealthcare")

#All as others as linear
formula_str <- paste(outcome, "~", paste(covariates, collapse = " + "))

#Fit GAM
gam_model_b <- gam(as.formula(formula_str),
                 family = binomial(),
                 data = df_1)

#summary of the model
summary(gam_model_b)
## 
## Family: binomial 
## Link function: logit 
## 
## Formula:
## Diabetes_binary ~ HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + BMI + Smoker + 
##     Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + PhysActivity + Fruits + Veggies + 
##     HvyAlcoholConsump + GenHlth + MentHlth + PhysHlth + DiffWalk + 
##     Sex + Age + Income + NoDocbcCost_flipped + AnyHealthcare
## 
## Parametric coefficients:
##                        Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)          -7.3317542  0.0937746 -78.185  < 2e-16 ***
## HighBP                0.7254439  0.0163272  44.432  < 2e-16 ***
## HighChol              0.5313332  0.0150650  35.269  < 2e-16 ***
## CholCheck             1.1054752  0.0708333  15.607  < 2e-16 ***
## BMI                   0.0546963  0.0009885  55.331  < 2e-16 ***
## Smoker               -0.0028328  0.0145755  -0.194 0.845896    
## Stroke                0.1281838  0.0279487   4.586 4.51e-06 ***
## HeartDiseaseorAttack  0.2157008  0.0198412  10.871  < 2e-16 ***
## PhysActivity         -0.0568092  0.0160049  -3.549 0.000386 ***
## Fruits               -0.0428835  0.0151672  -2.827 0.004693 ** 
## Veggies              -0.0410998  0.0176250  -2.332 0.019706 *  
## HvyAlcoholConsump    -0.6471071  0.0409709 -15.794  < 2e-16 ***
## GenHlth               0.4925212  0.0089224  55.201  < 2e-16 ***
## MentHlth             -0.0032244  0.0009418  -3.424 0.000618 ***
## PhysHlth             -0.0050030  0.0008673  -5.768 8.00e-09 ***
## DiffWalk              0.1393577  0.0189094   7.370 1.71e-13 ***
## Sex                   0.2212889  0.0148470  14.905  < 2e-16 ***
## Age                   0.1088203  0.0030360  35.843  < 2e-16 ***
## Income               -0.0607704  0.0036689 -16.564  < 2e-16 ***
## NoDocbcCost_flipped  -0.0116390  0.0254818  -0.457 0.647844    
## AnyHealthcare         0.1317030  0.0373163   3.529 0.000417 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## 
## R-sq.(adj) =  0.159   Deviance explained =   19%
## UBRE = -0.34576  Scale est. = 1         n = 202944
#add predicted probabilities
df_1_b$predicted_prob <- predict(gam_model_b, type = "response")

actual <- df_1_b$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_1_b$predicted_prob

#0.5 threshold
metrics_0.5 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.5)
print(metrics_0.5)
## $confusion_matrix
##          Actual
## Predicted      0      1
##         0 171245  24552
##         1   3420   3727
## 
## $TP
## [1] 3727
## 
## $FP
## [1] 3420
## 
## $TN
## [1] 171245
## 
## $FN
## [1] 24552
## 
## $sensitivity
## [1] 0.1317939
## 
## $specificity
## [1] 0.9804197
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.01958034
## 
## $FNR
## [1] 0.8682061
## 
## $accuracy
## [1] 0.8621689
#0.3 threshold 
metrics_0.3 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.3)
print(metrics_0.3)
## $confusion_matrix
##          Actual
## Predicted      0      1
##         0 158745  16838
##         1  15920  11441
## 
## $TP
## [1] 11441
## 
## $FP
## [1] 15920
## 
## $TN
## [1] 158745
## 
## $FN
## [1] 16838
## 
## $sensitivity
## [1] 0.4045758
## 
## $specificity
## [1] 0.9088541
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.09114591
## 
## $FNR
## [1] 0.5954242
## 
## $accuracy
## [1] 0.838586
#Using SVI as linear with per-variable splines and pairwise continuous interactions
#Using bam() instead of gam() for speed 
library(mgcv)
library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following object is masked from 'package:nlme':
## 
##     collapse
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
#to hold predicted probability
df_2 <- train_Diabetes_df   

outcome<-"Diabetes_binary"       
svi_var<-"SVI_scaled"            

#Continuous variables (leaving out Education and Income)
cont_var <- c("BMI", "Age", "PhysHlth", "MentHlth", "GenHlth")

#Categorical variables
cat_var <- c("HighBP", "HighChol", "CholCheck", "Smoker",
             "Stroke", "HeartDiseaseorAttack", "PhysActivity",
             "Fruits", "Veggies", "HvyAlcoholConsump",
             "DiffWalk", "Sex")

max_k_requested <- 5   #for spline basis dimension, don't want it to run too long
nthreads <- 14         #HPC cores to use for bam()


#change categorical variables to factors
for (v in cat_var) {
  if (!v %in% names(df_2)) stop(paste0("Categorical variable '", v, "' not found in df_2"))
  df_2[[v]] <- as.factor(df_2[[v]])
}

#Check continuous or categorical/factor
cont_var_safe <- c()
binary_from_cont <- c()
var_k <- list()

#check for unique values being more than 2 as show of continuous variable instead of categorical
for (v in cont_var) {
  if (!v %in% names(df_2)) stop(paste0("Continuous variable '", v, "' not found in df_2"))
  x <- df_2[[v]]
  nuniq <- length(unique(na.omit(x)))
  if (nuniq <= 2) {
    cat_var <- union(cat_var, v)
    binary_from_cont <- c(binary_from_cont, v)
  } else {
    #need to select k based on continuous and number of values 
    k_safe <- min(max_k_requested, max(3, nuniq - 1))  # ensure k >= 3 for a meaningful spline (adjustable)
    cont_var_safe <- c(cont_var_safe, v)
    var_k[[v]] <- k_safe
  }
}

#assign categorical variables
cat_var <- unique(cat_var)

terms_list <- character(0)

#Add SVI as a linear term
terms_list <- c(terms_list, svi_var)

#Add spline main effects 
for (v in cont_var_safe) {
  k_v <- var_k[[v]]
  terms_list <- c(terms_list, paste0("s(", v, ", k=", k_v, ")"))
}

#Add categorical main effects (parametric factors)
terms_list <- c(terms_list, cat_var)

#Pairwise continuous x continuous tensor interactions
interaction_terms_cc <- character(0)
if (length(cont_var_safe) > 1) {
  for (i in seq_len(length(cont_var_safe)-1)) {
    for (j in seq((i+1), length(cont_var_safe))) {
      v1 <- cont_var_safe[i]; v2 <- cont_var_safe[j]
      k1 <- var_k[[v1]]; k2 <- var_k[[v2]]
      # Use ti() with explicit k vector c(k1,k2)
      # specify k as "k=c(k1,k2)" inside call
      interaction_terms_cc <- c(interaction_terms_cc,
                                paste0("ti(", v1, ",", v2, ", k = c(", k1, ",", k2, "))"))
    }
  }
}

#add continuous x categorical interactions using 
interaction_terms_cg <- character(0)
for (v in cont_var_safe) {
  for (f in cat_var) {
    # only sensible if factor has >1 level
    if (nlevels(df_2[[f]]) > 1) {
      k_v <- var_k[[v]]
      interaction_terms_cg <- c(interaction_terms_cg, paste0("s(", v, ", by=", f, ", k=", k_v, ")"))
    }
  }
}

#put all terms together
all_terms <- c(terms_list, interaction_terms_cc, interaction_terms_cg)

#Formula
formula_str <- paste0(outcome, " ~ ", paste(all_terms, collapse = " + "))
cat("Final formula (preview):\n")
## Final formula (preview):
cat(formula_str, "\n\n")
## Diabetes_binary ~ SVI_scaled + s(BMI, k=5) + s(Age, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, k=5) + s(MentHlth, k=5) + s(GenHlth, k=4) + HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + Smoker + Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + PhysActivity + Fruits + Veggies + HvyAlcoholConsump + DiffWalk + Sex + ti(BMI,Age, k = c(5,5)) + ti(BMI,PhysHlth, k = c(5,5)) + ti(BMI,MentHlth, k = c(5,5)) + ti(BMI,GenHlth, k = c(5,4)) + ti(Age,PhysHlth, k = c(5,5)) + ti(Age,MentHlth, k = c(5,5)) + ti(Age,GenHlth, k = c(5,4)) + ti(PhysHlth,MentHlth, k = c(5,5)) + ti(PhysHlth,GenHlth, k = c(5,4)) + ti(MentHlth,GenHlth, k = c(5,4)) + s(BMI, by=HighBP, k=5) + s(BMI, by=HighChol, k=5) + s(BMI, by=CholCheck, k=5) + s(BMI, by=Smoker, k=5) + s(BMI, by=Stroke, k=5) + s(BMI, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5) + s(BMI, by=PhysActivity, k=5) + s(BMI, by=Fruits, k=5) + s(BMI, by=Veggies, k=5) + s(BMI, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5) + s(BMI, by=DiffWalk, k=5) + s(BMI, by=Sex, k=5) + s(Age, by=HighBP, k=5) + s(Age, by=HighChol, k=5) + s(Age, by=CholCheck, k=5) + s(Age, by=Smoker, k=5) + s(Age, by=Stroke, k=5) + s(Age, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5) + s(Age, by=PhysActivity, k=5) + s(Age, by=Fruits, k=5) + s(Age, by=Veggies, k=5) + s(Age, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5) + s(Age, by=DiffWalk, k=5) + s(Age, by=Sex, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=HighBP, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=HighChol, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=CholCheck, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=Smoker, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=Stroke, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=Fruits, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=Veggies, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=Sex, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=HighBP, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=HighChol, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=CholCheck, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=Smoker, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=Stroke, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=Fruits, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=Veggies, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=Sex, k=5) + s(GenHlth, by=HighBP, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=HighChol, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=CholCheck, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=Smoker, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=Stroke, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=Fruits, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=Veggies, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=Sex, k=4)
# ---- Fit bam() ----
#discrete=TRUE to speed things up; nthreads as 14 (max on hpc)
#tryCatch to show mgcv errors
fit_result <- tryCatch({
  bam_fit <- bam(as.formula(formula_str),
                 data = df_2,
                 family = binomial(),
                 discrete = TRUE,
                 nthreads = nthreads,
                 select = TRUE,
                 method = "fREML")   # fREML often fast & robust
  bam_fit
}, error = function(e) {
  message("bam() failed with error:\n", e$message)
  stop(e)
})

#print summary
print(summary(fit_result))
## 
## Family: binomial 
## Link function: logit 
## 
## Formula:
## Diabetes_binary ~ SVI_scaled + s(BMI, k = 5) + s(Age, k = 5) + 
##     s(PhysHlth, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, k = 5) + s(GenHlth, k = 4) + 
##     HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + Smoker + Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + 
##     PhysActivity + Fruits + Veggies + HvyAlcoholConsump + DiffWalk + 
##     Sex + ti(BMI, Age, k = c(5, 5)) + ti(BMI, PhysHlth, k = c(5, 
##     5)) + ti(BMI, MentHlth, k = c(5, 5)) + ti(BMI, GenHlth, k = c(5, 
##     4)) + ti(Age, PhysHlth, k = c(5, 5)) + ti(Age, MentHlth, 
##     k = c(5, 5)) + ti(Age, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4)) + ti(PhysHlth, 
##     MentHlth, k = c(5, 5)) + ti(PhysHlth, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4)) + 
##     ti(MentHlth, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4)) + s(BMI, by = HighBP, 
##     k = 5) + s(BMI, by = HighChol, k = 5) + s(BMI, by = CholCheck, 
##     k = 5) + s(BMI, by = Smoker, k = 5) + s(BMI, by = Stroke, 
##     k = 5) + s(BMI, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5) + s(BMI, 
##     by = PhysActivity, k = 5) + s(BMI, by = Fruits, k = 5) + 
##     s(BMI, by = Veggies, k = 5) + s(BMI, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, 
##     k = 5) + s(BMI, by = DiffWalk, k = 5) + s(BMI, by = Sex, 
##     k = 5) + s(Age, by = HighBP, k = 5) + s(Age, by = HighChol, 
##     k = 5) + s(Age, by = CholCheck, k = 5) + s(Age, by = Smoker, 
##     k = 5) + s(Age, by = Stroke, k = 5) + s(Age, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, 
##     k = 5) + s(Age, by = PhysActivity, k = 5) + s(Age, by = Fruits, 
##     k = 5) + s(Age, by = Veggies, k = 5) + s(Age, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, 
##     k = 5) + s(Age, by = DiffWalk, k = 5) + s(Age, by = Sex, 
##     k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = HighBP, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = HighChol, 
##     k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = CholCheck, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = Smoker, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = Stroke, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = PhysActivity, 
##     k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = Fruits, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = Veggies, 
##     k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = DiffWalk, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = Sex, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = HighBP, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = HighChol, k = 5) + 
##     s(MentHlth, by = CholCheck, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = Smoker, 
##     k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = Stroke, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, 
##     k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = PhysActivity, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = Fruits, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = Veggies, k = 5) + 
##     s(MentHlth, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = DiffWalk, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = Sex, k = 5) + s(GenHlth, 
##     by = HighBP, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = HighChol, k = 4) + 
##     s(GenHlth, by = CholCheck, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = Smoker, 
##     k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = Stroke, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, 
##     k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = PhysActivity, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, 
##     by = Fruits, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = Veggies, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, 
##     by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = DiffWalk, 
##     k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = Sex, k = 4)
## 
## Parametric coefficients:
##                        Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)           -3.489883   0.203574 -17.143  < 2e-16 ***
## SVI_scaled            -0.410012   0.026396 -15.533  < 2e-16 ***
## HighBP1                0.849316   0.092920   9.140  < 2e-16 ***
## HighChol1              0.669779   0.025174  26.606  < 2e-16 ***
## CholCheck1             1.047730   0.170253   6.154 7.56e-10 ***
## Smoker1               -0.008682   0.026473  -0.328 0.742950    
## Stroke1                0.323410   0.048492   6.669 2.57e-11 ***
## HeartDiseaseorAttack1  0.480159   0.039774  12.072  < 2e-16 ***
## PhysActivity1         -0.167344   0.076116  -2.199 0.027911 *  
## Fruits1                0.047582   0.036027   1.321 0.186589    
## Veggies1              -0.034327   0.066739  -0.514 0.607011    
## HvyAlcoholConsump1    -0.719092   0.202486  -3.551 0.000383 ***
## DiffWalk1              0.294700   0.036655   8.040 8.99e-16 ***
## Sex1                   0.102029   0.032701   3.120 0.001808 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Approximate significance of smooth terms:
##                                         edf Ref.df  Chi.sq  p-value    
## s(BMI)                            3.3523086      4 108.541  < 2e-16 ***
## s(Age)                            2.3914758      4   7.033 0.001093 ** 
## s(PhysHlth)                       0.0054283      4   0.003 0.473615    
## s(MentHlth)                       0.0023592      4   0.000 0.853227    
## s(GenHlth)                        0.0047296      3   0.002 0.216955    
## ti(BMI,Age)                       6.9851262     16  41.074  < 2e-16 ***
## ti(BMI,PhysHlth)                  0.0043064     16   0.001 0.832924    
## ti(BMI,MentHlth)                  1.6813437     16   6.283 0.007143 ** 
## ti(GenHlth,BMI)                   3.6089289     12  12.303 0.001524 **

## s(GenHlth):Veggies1               0.2401349      3   0.313 0.240510

## s(GenHlth):DiffWalk0              0.9209747      3  11.160  < 2e-16 ***

## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## R-sq.(adj) =  0.177   Deviance explained = 20.8%
## fREML = 2.5159e+05  Scale est. = 1         n = 202944
#Evaluate on training data
#if (!all(is.na(df_2[[outcome]]))) {
#  library(pROC)
#  roc_obj <- roc(df_2[[outcome]], df_2$predicted_prob_bam, direction = "<")
#  cat("AUC on training data:", round(auc(roc_obj), 3), "\n")
#}

#Save model
bam_model <- fit_result
#save to the workspace
bam_model_summary<-summary(bam_model)
library(pROC)
## Type 'citation("pROC")' for a citation.
## 
## Attaching package: 'pROC'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     cov, smooth, var
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
#predict and add to df_2
df_2$predicted_prob <- predict(bam_model, type="response")

#left here, but done in its own Rmd
roc_obj <- roc(df_2[[outcome]],
               df_2$predicted_prob)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
auc_val <- auc(roc_obj)
cat("AUC:", round(auc_val, 3), "\n")
## AUC: 0.818
#calibration plot
calib_df <- df_2 %>%
  mutate(bin = cut(predicted_prob, breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1))) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(mean_pred = mean(predicted_prob),
            mean_actual = mean(!!sym(outcome)), .groups="drop")

ggplot(calib_df, aes(x=mean_pred, y=mean_actual)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line(color='blue') +
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept=0, linetype='dashed', color='red') +
  labs(x="Mean predicted probability", y="Observed proportion",
       title="Calibration plot") +
  theme_minimal()

edf <- bam_model_summary$s.table[, "edf"]
term_names <- rownames(bam_model_summary$s.table)
important_terms <- term_names[edf > 0.1]
cat("Important terms (edf > 0.1):\n")
## Important terms (edf > 0.1):
print(important_terms)
##  [1] "s(BMI)"                            "s(Age)"                           
##  [3] "ti(BMI,Age)"                       "ti(BMI,MentHlth)"                 
##  [5] "ti(GenHlth,BMI)"                   "ti(Age,PhysHlth)"                 
##  [7] "ti(Age,MentHlth)"                  "ti(GenHlth,Age)"                  
##  [9] "ti(GenHlth,PhysHlth)"              "ti(GenHlth,MentHlth)"             
## [11] "s(BMI):HighBP0"                    "s(BMI):CholCheck1"                
## [13] "s(BMI):Smoker1"                    "s(BMI):PhysActivity1"             
## [15] "s(BMI):Fruits0"                    "s(BMI):Veggies1"                  
## [17] "s(BMI):HvyAlcoholConsump1"         "s(BMI):Sex0"                      
## [19] "s(Age):HighBP0"                    "s(Age):HighBP1"                   
## [21] "s(Age):HighChol0"                  "s(Age):Smoker0"                   
## [23] "s(Age):Stroke0"                    "s(Age):HeartDiseaseorAttack0"     
## [25] "s(Age):HvyAlcoholConsump1"         "s(Age):Sex1"                      
## [27] "s(PhysHlth):HighBP1"               "s(PhysHlth):HighChol1"            
## [29] "s(PhysHlth):CholCheck0"            "s(PhysHlth):Smoker1"              
## [31] "s(PhysHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack1" "s(PhysHlth):PhysActivity0"        
## [33] "s(PhysHlth):Fruits0"               "s(PhysHlth):DiffWalk1"            
## [35] "s(PhysHlth):Sex1"                  "s(MentHlth):HighBP0"              
## [37] "s(MentHlth):HighChol1"             "s(MentHlth):PhysActivity0"        
## [39] "s(MentHlth):Fruits0"               "s(MentHlth):Veggies0"             
## [41] "s(MentHlth):DiffWalk0"             "s(GenHlth):HighBP0"               
## [43] "s(GenHlth):HighBP1"                "s(GenHlth):CholCheck0"            
## [45] "s(GenHlth):Smoker0"                "s(GenHlth):Stroke0"               
## [47] "s(GenHlth):Stroke1"                "s(GenHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack0" 
## [49] "s(GenHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack1"  "s(GenHlth):PhysActivity0"         
## [51] "s(GenHlth):PhysActivity1"          "s(GenHlth):Veggies1"              
## [53] "s(GenHlth):DiffWalk0"              "s(GenHlth):DiffWalk1"             
## [55] "s(GenHlth):Sex0"
get_classification_metrics <- function(actual, predicted_prob, threshold = 0.5) {
  #probabilities to class labels based on threshold
  predicted_class <- ifelse(predicted_prob >= threshold, 1, 0)
  
  #Confusion matrix
  conf_mat <- table(Predicted = predicted_class, Actual = actual)
  
  #Check cells are there
  TP <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["1","1"]), conf_mat["1","1"], 0)
  TN <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["0","0"]), conf_mat["0","0"], 0)
  FP <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["1","0"]), conf_mat["1","0"], 0)
  FN <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["0","1"]), conf_mat["0","1"], 0)
  
  # Metrics
  sensitivity <- TP / (TP + FN)        # True Positive Rate
  specificity <- TN / (TN + FP)        # True Negative Rate
  FPR <- FP / (FP + TN)                # False Positive Rate
  FNR <- FN / (FN + TP)                # False Negative Rate
  accuracy <- (TP + TN) / (TP + TN + FP + FN)
  
  #return read outs of different metrics
  metrics <- list(
    confusion_matrix = conf_mat,
    TP = TP, FP = FP, TN = TN, FN = FN,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    FPR = FPR,
    FNR = FNR,
    accuracy = accuracy
  )
  
  return(metrics)
}


actual <- df_2$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_2$predicted_prob

#0.5 threshold
metrics_0.5 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.5)
print(metrics_0.5)
## $confusion_matrix
##          Actual
## Predicted      0      1
##         0 171895  24624
##         1   2770   3655
## 
## $TP
## [1] 3655
## 
## $FP
## [1] 2770
## 
## $TN
## [1] 171895
## 
## $FN
## [1] 24624
## 
## $sensitivity
## [1] 0.1292479
## 
## $specificity
## [1] 0.9841411
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.01585893
## 
## $FNR
## [1] 0.8707521
## 
## $accuracy
## [1] 0.865017
#0.3 threshold (for underrepresented diabetics)
metrics_0.3 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.3)
print(metrics_0.3)
## $confusion_matrix
##          Actual
## Predicted      0      1
##         0 157186  15345
##         1  17479  12934
## 
## $TP
## [1] 12934
## 
## $FP
## [1] 17479
## 
## $TN
## [1] 157186
## 
## $FN
## [1] 15345
## 
## $sensitivity
## [1] 0.4573712
## 
## $specificity
## [1] 0.8999284
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.1000716
## 
## $FNR
## [1] 0.5426288
## 
## $accuracy
## [1] 0.8382608
##Using individual socioeconomic varibales (no SVI) with per-variable splines and pairwise continuous interactions
#Using bam() instead of gam() for speed 
#same steps as for df_2 bam, see those comments
df_2_b <- train_Diabetes_df   
outcome     <- "Diabetes_binary"       # 0/1 outcome name
svi_var     <- "SVI_scaled"            # SVI not included as linear term

#with Education/Income
cont_var <- c("BMI", "Age", "PhysHlth", "MentHlth", "GenHlth", "Income", "Education")

#with NoDocbcCost_flipped, AnyHealthcare
cat_var <- c("HighBP", "HighChol", "CholCheck", "Smoker",
             "Stroke", "HeartDiseaseorAttack", "PhysActivity",
             "Fruits", "Veggies", "HvyAlcoholConsump",
             "DiffWalk", "Sex", "NoDocbcCost_flipped","AnyHealthcare")

max_k_requested <- 5   
nthreads <- 14        


#categorical variables to factor
for (v in cat_var) {
  if (!v %in% names(df_2_b)) stop(paste0("Categorical variable '", v, "' not found in df_2_b"))
  df_2_b[[v]] <- as.factor(df_2_b[[v]])
}

cont_var_safe <- c()
binary_from_cont <- c()
var_k <- list()

for (v in cont_var) {
  if (!v %in% names(df_2_b)) stop(paste0("Continuous variable '", v, "' not found in df_2_b"))
  x <- df_2_b[[v]]
  nuniq <- length(unique(na.omit(x)))
  if (nuniq <= 2) {
    cat_var <- union(cat_var, v)
    binary_from_cont <- c(binary_from_cont, v)
  } else {
    k_safe <- min(max_k_requested, max(3, nuniq - 1)) 
    cont_var_safe <- c(cont_var_safe, v)
    var_k[[v]] <- k_safe
  }
}

cat_var <- unique(cat_var)

terms_list <- character(0)

#Don't use SVI as linear
#if (!svi_var %in% names(df_2_b)) stop("SVI variable not found in df_2_b")
#terms_list <- c(terms_list)

# Add spline main effects for continuous safe vars
for (v in cont_var_safe) {
  k_v <- var_k[[v]]
  terms_list <- c(terms_list, paste0("s(", v, ", k=", k_v, ")"))
}


terms_list <- c(terms_list, cat_var)

interaction_terms_cc <- character(0)
if (length(cont_var_safe) > 1) {
  for (i in seq_len(length(cont_var_safe)-1)) {
    for (j in seq((i+1), length(cont_var_safe))) {
      v1 <- cont_var_safe[i]; v2 <- cont_var_safe[j]
      k1 <- var_k[[v1]]; k2 <- var_k[[v2]]
      # Use ti() with explicit k vector c(k1,k2)
      # specify k as "k=c(k1,k2)" inside call
      interaction_terms_cc <- c(interaction_terms_cc,
                                paste0("ti(", v1, ",", v2, ", k = c(", k1, ",", k2, "))"))
    }
  }
}

interaction_terms_cg <- character(0)
for (v in cont_var_safe) {
  for (f in cat_var) {
    #only if factor has more than 1 level
    if (nlevels(df_2_b[[f]]) > 1) {
      k_v <- var_k[[v]]
      interaction_terms_cg <- c(interaction_terms_cg, paste0("s(", v, ", by=", f, ", k=", k_v, ")"))
    }
  }
}

all_terms <- c(terms_list, interaction_terms_cc, interaction_terms_cg)

formula_str <- paste0(outcome, " ~ ", paste(all_terms, collapse = " + "))
cat("Final formula (preview):\n")
## Final formula (preview):
cat(formula_str, "\n\n")
## Diabetes_binary ~ s(BMI, k=5) + s(Age, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, k=5) + s(MentHlth, k=5) + s(GenHlth, k=4) + s(Income, k=5) + s(Education, k=5) + HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + Smoker + Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + PhysActivity + Fruits + Veggies + HvyAlcoholConsump + DiffWalk + Sex + NoDocbcCost_flipped + AnyHealthcare + ti(BMI,Age, k = c(5,5)) + ti(BMI,PhysHlth, k = c(5,5)) + ti(BMI,MentHlth, k = c(5,5)) + ti(BMI,GenHlth, k = c(5,4)) + ti(BMI,Income, k = c(5,5)) + ti(BMI,Education, k = c(5,5)) + ti(Age,PhysHlth, k = c(5,5)) + ti(Age,MentHlth, k = c(5,5)) + ti(Age,GenHlth, k = c(5,4)) + ti(Age,Income, k = c(5,5)) + ti(Age,Education, k = c(5,5)) + ti(PhysHlth,MentHlth, k = c(5,5)) + ti(PhysHlth,GenHlth, k = c(5,4)) + ti(PhysHlth,Income, k = c(5,5)) + ti(PhysHlth,Education, k = c(5,5)) + ti(MentHlth,GenHlth, k = c(5,4)) + ti(MentHlth,Income, k = c(5,5)) + ti(MentHlth,Education, k = c(5,5)) + ti(GenHlth,Income, k = c(4,5)) + ti(GenHlth,Education, k = c(4,5)) + ti(Income,Education, k = c(5,5)) + s(BMI, by=HighBP, k=5) + s(BMI, by=HighChol, k=5) + s(BMI, by=CholCheck, k=5) + s(BMI, by=Smoker, k=5) + s(BMI, by=Stroke, k=5) + s(BMI, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5) + s(BMI, by=PhysActivity, k=5) + s(BMI, by=Fruits, k=5) + s(BMI, by=Veggies, k=5) + s(BMI, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5) + s(BMI, by=DiffWalk, k=5) + s(BMI, by=Sex, k=5) + s(BMI, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5) + s(BMI, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5) + s(Age, by=HighBP, k=5) + s(Age, by=HighChol, k=5) + s(Age, by=CholCheck, k=5) + s(Age, by=Smoker, k=5) + s(Age, by=Stroke, k=5) + s(Age, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5) + s(Age, by=PhysActivity, k=5) + s(Age, by=Fruits, k=5) + s(Age, by=Veggies, k=5) + s(Age, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5) + s(Age, by=DiffWalk, k=5) + s(Age, by=Sex, k=5) + s(Age, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5) + s(Age, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=HighBP, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=HighChol, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=CholCheck, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=Smoker, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=Stroke, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=Fruits, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=Veggies, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=Sex, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5) + s(PhysHlth, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=HighBP, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=HighChol, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=CholCheck, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=Smoker, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=Stroke, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=Fruits, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=Veggies, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=Sex, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5) + s(MentHlth, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5) + s(GenHlth, by=HighBP, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=HighChol, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=CholCheck, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=Smoker, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=Stroke, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=Fruits, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=Veggies, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=Sex, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=4) + s(GenHlth, by=AnyHealthcare, k=4) + s(Income, by=HighBP, k=5) + s(Income, by=HighChol, k=5) + s(Income, by=CholCheck, k=5) + s(Income, by=Smoker, k=5) + s(Income, by=Stroke, k=5) + s(Income, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5) + s(Income, by=PhysActivity, k=5) + s(Income, by=Fruits, k=5) + s(Income, by=Veggies, k=5) + s(Income, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5) + s(Income, by=DiffWalk, k=5) + s(Income, by=Sex, k=5) + s(Income, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5) + s(Income, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5) + s(Education, by=HighBP, k=5) + s(Education, by=HighChol, k=5) + s(Education, by=CholCheck, k=5) + s(Education, by=Smoker, k=5) + s(Education, by=Stroke, k=5) + s(Education, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5) + s(Education, by=PhysActivity, k=5) + s(Education, by=Fruits, k=5) + s(Education, by=Veggies, k=5) + s(Education, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5) + s(Education, by=DiffWalk, k=5) + s(Education, by=Sex, k=5) + s(Education, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5) + s(Education, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5)
fit_result <- tryCatch({
  bam_fit <- bam(as.formula(formula_str),
                 data = df_2_b,
                 family = binomial(),
                 discrete = TRUE,
                 nthreads = nthreads,
                 select = TRUE,
                 method = "fREML")   # fREML often fast & robust
  bam_fit
}, error = function(e) {
  message("bam() failed with error:\n", e$message)
  stop(e)
})

print(summary(fit_result))
## 
## Family: binomial 
## Link function: logit 
## 
## Formula:
## Diabetes_binary ~ s(BMI, k = 5) + s(Age, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, 
##     k = 5) + s(MentHlth, k = 5) + s(GenHlth, k = 4) + s(Income, 
##     k = 5) + s(Education, k = 5) + HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + 
##     Smoker + Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + PhysActivity + Fruits + 
##     Veggies + HvyAlcoholConsump + DiffWalk + Sex + NoDocbcCost_flipped + 
##     AnyHealthcare + ti(BMI, Age, k = c(5, 5)) + ti(BMI, PhysHlth, 
##     k = c(5, 5)) + ti(BMI, MentHlth, k = c(5, 5)) + ti(BMI, GenHlth, 
##     k = c(5, 4)) + ti(BMI, Income, k = c(5, 5)) + ti(BMI, Education, 
##     k = c(5, 5)) + ti(Age, PhysHlth, k = c(5, 5)) + ti(Age, MentHlth, 
##     k = c(5, 5)) + ti(Age, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4)) + ti(Age, Income, 
##     k = c(5, 5)) + ti(Age, Education, k = c(5, 5)) + ti(PhysHlth, 
##     MentHlth, k = c(5, 5)) + ti(PhysHlth, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4)) + 
##     ti(PhysHlth, Income, k = c(5, 5)) + ti(PhysHlth, Education, 
##     k = c(5, 5)) + ti(MentHlth, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4)) + ti(MentHlth, 
##     Income, k = c(5, 5)) + ti(MentHlth, Education, k = c(5, 5)) + 
##     ti(GenHlth, Income, k = c(4, 5)) + ti(GenHlth, Education, 
##     k = c(4, 5)) + ti(Income, Education, k = c(5, 5)) + s(BMI, 
##     by = HighBP, k = 5) + s(BMI, by = HighChol, k = 5) + s(BMI, 
##     by = CholCheck, k = 5) + s(BMI, by = Smoker, k = 5) + s(BMI, 
##     by = Stroke, k = 5) + s(BMI, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5) + 
##     s(BMI, by = PhysActivity, k = 5) + s(BMI, by = Fruits, k = 5) + 
##     s(BMI, by = Veggies, k = 5) + s(BMI, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, 
##     k = 5) + s(BMI, by = DiffWalk, k = 5) + s(BMI, by = Sex, 
##     k = 5) + s(BMI, by = NoDocbcCost_flipped, k = 5) + s(BMI, 
##     by = AnyHealthcare, k = 5) + s(Age, by = HighBP, k = 5) + 
##     s(Age, by = HighChol, k = 5) + s(Age, by = CholCheck, k = 5) +

##     s(Age, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5) + s(Age, by = PhysActivity, 
##     k = 5) + s(Age, by = Fruits, k = 5) + s(Age, by = Veggies, 
##     k = 5) + s(Age, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5) + s(Age, by = DiffWalk, 
##     k = 5) + s(Age, by = Sex, k = 5) + s(Age, by = NoDocbcCost_flipped, 
##     k = 5) + s(Age, by = AnyHealthcare, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = HighBP, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = HighChol, k = 5) + 
##     s(PhysHlth, by = CholCheck, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = Smoker, 
##     k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = Stroke, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, 
##     k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = PhysActivity, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = Fruits, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = Veggies, k = 5) + 
##     s(PhysHlth, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = DiffWalk, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = Sex, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = NoDocbcCost_flipped, k = 5) + s(PhysHlth, by = AnyHealthcare, 
##     k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = HighBP, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = HighChol, 
##     k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = CholCheck, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = Smoker, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = Stroke, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = PhysActivity, 
##     k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = Fruits, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = Veggies, 
##     k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = DiffWalk, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = Sex, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = NoDocbcCost_flipped, k = 5) + s(MentHlth, by = AnyHealthcare, 
##     k = 5) + s(GenHlth, by = HighBP, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = HighChol, 
##     k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = CholCheck, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = Smoker, 
##     k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = Stroke, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, 
##     k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = PhysActivity, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, 
##     by = Fruits, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = Veggies, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, 
##     by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = DiffWalk, 
##     k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = Sex, k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = NoDocbcCost_flipped, 
##     k = 4) + s(GenHlth, by = AnyHealthcare, k = 4) + s(Income, 
##     by = HighBP, k = 5) + s(Income, by = HighChol, k = 5) + s(Income, 
##     by = CholCheck, k = 5) + s(Income, by = Smoker, k = 5) + 
##     s(Income, by = Stroke, k = 5) + s(Income, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, 
##     k = 5) + s(Income, by = PhysActivity, k = 5) + s(Income, 
##     by = Fruits, k = 5) + s(Income, by = Veggies, k = 5) + s(Income, 
##     by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5) + s(Income, by = DiffWalk, 
##     k = 5) + s(Income, by = Sex, k = 5) + s(Income, by = NoDocbcCost_flipped, 
##     k = 5) + s(Income, by = AnyHealthcare, k = 5) + s(Education, 
##     by = HighBP, k = 5) + s(Education, by = HighChol, k = 5) + 
##     s(Education, by = CholCheck, k = 5) + s(Education, by = Smoker, 
##     k = 5) + s(Education, by = Stroke, k = 5) + s(Education, 
##     by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5) + s(Education, by = PhysActivity, 
##     k = 5) + s(Education, by = Fruits, k = 5) + s(Education, 
##     by = Veggies, k = 5) + s(Education, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, 
##     k = 5) + s(Education, by = DiffWalk, k = 5) + s(Education, 
##     by = Sex, k = 5) + s(Education, by = NoDocbcCost_flipped, 
##     k = 5) + s(Education, by = AnyHealthcare, k = 5)

## ti(GenHlth,PhysHlth)               2.060522     12  19.548 9.91e-06 ***

## ti(GenHlth,MentHlth)               0.624463     12   1.140 0.140004

## ti(MentHlth,Education)             1.801940     16  16.577 1.01e-05 ***

## ti(GenHlth,Education)              5.007820     12  27.619 2.83e-06 ***
## ti(Income,Education)               4.218869     16   9.539 0.019189 *  
## s(BMI):HighBP0                     1.782057      4   8.103 0.006854 ** 
## s(BMI):HighBP1                     0.003197      4   0.000 0.682086    
## s(BMI):HighChol0                   0.004993      4   0.002 0.609091    
## s(BMI):HighChol1                   0.004873      4   0.001 0.642156    
## s(BMI):CholCheck0                  0.004989      4   0.002 0.559344    
## s(BMI):CholCheck1                  0.226867      4   0.291 0.220601    
## s(BMI):Smoker0                     0.003881      4   0.003 0.254033    
## s(BMI):Smoker1                     0.691228      4   1.438 0.121775    
## s(BMI):Stroke0                     0.002910      4   0.000 0.957030    
## s(BMI):Stroke1                     0.003227      4   0.000 0.920286    
## s(BMI):HeartDiseaseorAttack0       0.011062      4   0.008 0.397950    
## s(BMI):HeartDiseaseorAttack1       0.005066      4   0.002 0.574493    
## s(BMI):PhysActivity0               0.002542      4   0.001 0.505367    
## s(BMI):PhysActivity1               1.061904      4   2.109 0.123772    
## s(BMI):Fruits0                     0.545908      4   0.948 0.160166    
## s(BMI):Fruits1                     0.009222      4   0.007 0.261151    
## s(BMI):Veggies0                    0.003665      4   0.001 0.401117    
## s(BMI):Veggies1                    1.083352      4   2.847 0.065217 .  
## s(BMI):HvyAlcoholConsump0          0.003402      4   0.001 0.450872    
## s(BMI):HvyAlcoholConsump1          1.280374      4   2.692 0.114387    
## s(BMI):DiffWalk0                   1.629532      4   4.490 0.046768 *  
## s(BMI):DiffWalk1                   0.002181      4   0.000 0.518337    
## s(BMI):Sex0                        1.472976      4   3.481 0.078722 .  
## s(BMI):Sex1                        0.004289      4   0.001 0.376025    
## s(BMI):NoDocbcCost_flipped0        0.004265      4   0.001 0.573336    
## s(BMI):NoDocbcCost_flipped1        0.860026      4   1.616 0.134092    
## s(BMI):AnyHealthcare0              0.003491      4   0.001 0.405567    
## s(BMI):AnyHealthcare1              1.999752      4   7.491 0.005729 ** 
## s(Age):HighBP0                     0.869131      4   6.578 0.001090 ** 
## s(Age):HighBP1                     2.519849      4  17.890 4.01e-05 ***
## s(Age):HighChol0                   0.992772      4 117.629  < 2e-16 ***
## s(Age):HighChol1                   0.001991      4   0.000 0.913411    
## s(Age):CholCheck0                  0.003209      4   0.001 0.796617    
## s(Age):CholCheck1                  0.002832      4   0.000 0.844726    
## s(Age):Smoker0                     0.004166      4   0.002 0.520874

## s(Education):Smoker1               0.009071      4   0.007 0.234683    
## s(Education):Stroke0               0.731143      4   2.658 0.039500 *  
## s(Education):Stroke1               0.004980      4   0.004 0.274892

## s(Education):Veggies1              0.002703      4   0.000 0.890557

## s(Education):DiffWalk1             0.003560      4   0.001 0.708645    
## s(Education):Sex0                  0.696521      4   2.276 0.062865 .  
## s(Education):Sex1                  0.005864      4   0.004 0.313474    
## s(Education):NoDocbcCost_flipped0  0.004633      4   0.001 0.720218    
## s(Education):NoDocbcCost_flipped1  0.003584      4   0.001 0.700754    
## s(Education):AnyHealthcare0        1.095734      4   2.898 0.066579 .  
## s(Education):AnyHealthcare1        0.003327      4   0.001 0.527070    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## R-sq.(adj) =   0.18   Deviance explained =   21%
## fREML = 2.5147e+05  Scale est. = 1         n = 202944
#if (!all(is.na(df_2_b[[outcome]]))) {
#  library(pROC)
#  roc_obj <- roc(df_2_b[[outcome]], df_2_b$predicted_prob_bam, direction = "<")
#  cat("AUC on training data:", round(auc(roc_obj), 3), "\n")
#}

bam_model_b <- fit_result
bam_b_summary<-summary(bam_model_b)
#add predicted prob to df_2_b
df_2_b$predicted_prob <- predict(bam_model_b, type="response")


#ROC and AUC
roc_obj <- roc(df_2_b[[outcome]],
               df_2_b$predicted_prob)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
auc_val <- auc(roc_obj)
cat("AUC:", round(auc_val, 3), "\n")
## AUC: 0.819
#calibration plot
calib_df <- df_2_b %>%
  mutate(bin = cut(predicted_prob, breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1))) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(mean_pred = mean(predicted_prob),
            mean_actual = mean(!!sym(outcome)), .groups="drop")

ggplot(calib_df, aes(x=mean_pred, y=mean_actual)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line(color='blue') +
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept=0, linetype='dashed', color='red') +
  labs(x="Mean predicted probability", y="Observed proportion",
       title="Calibration plot") +
  theme_minimal()

get_classification_metrics <- function(actual, predicted_prob, threshold = 0.5) {
  predicted_class <- ifelse(predicted_prob >= threshold, 1, 0)
  

  conf_mat <- table(Predicted = predicted_class, Actual = actual)
  

  TP <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["1","1"]), conf_mat["1","1"], 0)
  TN <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["0","0"]), conf_mat["0","0"], 0)
  FP <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["1","0"]), conf_mat["1","0"], 0)
  FN <- ifelse(!is.na(conf_mat["0","1"]), conf_mat["0","1"], 0)
  
  sensitivity <- TP / (TP + FN)        # True Positive Rate
  specificity <- TN / (TN + FP)        # True Negative Rate
  FPR <- FP / (FP + TN)                # False Positive Rate
  FNR <- FN / (FN + TP)                # False Negative Rate
  accuracy <- (TP + TN) / (TP + TN + FP + FN)
  
  metrics <- list(
    confusion_matrix = conf_mat,
    TP = TP, FP = FP, TN = TN, FN = FN,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    FPR = FPR,
    FNR = FNR,
    accuracy = accuracy
  )
  
  return(metrics)
}


actual <- df_2_b$Diabetes_binary
predicted <- df_2_b$predicted_prob

metrics_0.5 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.5)
print(metrics_0.5)
## $confusion_matrix
##          Actual
## Predicted      0      1
##         0 171887  24481
##         1   2778   3798
## 
## $TP
## [1] 3798
## 
## $FP
## [1] 2778
## 
## $TN
## [1] 171887
## 
## $FN
## [1] 24481
## 
## $sensitivity
## [1] 0.1343046
## 
## $specificity
## [1] 0.9840953
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.01590473
## 
## $FNR
## [1] 0.8656954
## 
## $accuracy
## [1] 0.8656822
metrics_0.3 <- get_classification_metrics(actual, predicted, threshold = 0.3)
print(metrics_0.3)
## $confusion_matrix
##          Actual
## Predicted      0      1
##         0 157199  15243
##         1  17466  13036
## 
## $TP
## [1] 13036
## 
## $FP
## [1] 17466
## 
## $TN
## [1] 157199
## 
## $FN
## [1] 15243
## 
## $sensitivity
## [1] 0.4609781
## 
## $specificity
## [1] 0.9000029
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.09999714
## 
## $FNR
## [1] 0.5390219
## 
## $accuracy
## [1] 0.8388275
#SVI with splines, interactions, and feature selection through shrinking variables 

library(mgcv)
library(dplyr)
library(pROC)
library(ggplot2)

df_3 <- train_Diabetes_df
outcome <- "Diabetes_binary"
svi_var <- "SVI_scaled"

cont_var <- c("BMI", "Age", "PhysHlth", "MentHlth", "GenHlth")
cat_var <- c("HighBP", "HighChol", "CholCheck", "Smoker",
             "Stroke", "HeartDiseaseorAttack", "PhysActivity",
             "Fruits", "Veggies", "HvyAlcoholConsump",
             "DiffWalk", "Sex")

max_k_requested <- 5
nthreads <- 14

df_3[[outcome]] <- as.numeric(df_3[[outcome]])
if (!all(df_3[[outcome]] %in% c(0,1))) {
  df_3[[outcome]] <- ifelse(df_3[[outcome]] %in% c("Yes","Y","1","True","T"),1,0)
}


for (v in cat_var) df_3[[v]] <- as.factor(df_3[[v]])

#which continuous vars have enough unique values
cont_var_safe <- c()
var_k <- list()

for (v in cont_var) {
  nuniq <- length(unique(na.omit(df_3[[v]])))
  if (nuniq > 2) {
    k_safe <- min(max_k_requested, max(3, nuniq - 1))
    cont_var_safe <- c(cont_var_safe, v)
    var_k[[v]] <- k_safe
  } else {
    cat_var <- union(cat_var, v)
  }
}

cat("Spline variables & k:\n")
## Spline variables & k:
print(var_k)
## $BMI
## [1] 5
## 
## $Age
## [1] 5
## 
## $PhysHlth
## [1] 5
## 
## $MentHlth
## [1] 5
## 
## $GenHlth
## [1] 4
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# FORMULA CONSTRUCTION
# ------------------------------------------------------------
terms_list <- c(svi_var)

#spline main effects
for (v in cont_var_safe) {
  terms_list <- c(terms_list, paste0("s(", v, ", k=", var_k[[v]], ", bs='cs')"))
}

#factor main effects
terms_list <- c(terms_list, cat_var)

#continuous × continuous tensor interactions
interaction_terms_cc <- c()
if (length(cont_var_safe) > 1) {
  for (i in seq_len(length(cont_var_safe)-1)) {
    for (j in (i+1):length(cont_var_safe)) {
      v1 <- cont_var_safe[i]; v2 <- cont_var_safe[j]
      interaction_terms_cc <- c(
        interaction_terms_cc,
        paste0("ti(", v1, ",", v2, ", k=c(", var_k[[v1]], ",", var_k[[v2]], "), bs=c('cs','cs'))")
      )
    }
  }
}

#continuous × categorical interactions
interaction_terms_cg <- c()
for (v in cont_var_safe) {
  for (f in cat_var) {
    if (nlevels(df_3[[f]]) > 1) {
      interaction_terms_cg <- c(interaction_terms_cg,
                                paste0("s(", v, ", by=", f, ", k=", var_k[[v]], ", bs='cs')"))
    }
  }
}

all_terms <- c(terms_list, interaction_terms_cc, interaction_terms_cg)

formula_str <- paste0(outcome, " ~ ", paste(all_terms, collapse=" + "))
cat("\nFinal GAM Formula:\n")
## 
## Final GAM Formula:
cat(formula_str, "\n\n")
## Diabetes_binary ~ SVI_scaled + s(BMI, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, k=5, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, k=4, bs='cs') + HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + Smoker + Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + PhysActivity + Fruits + Veggies + HvyAlcoholConsump + DiffWalk + Sex + ti(BMI,Age, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,PhysHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,MentHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,PhysHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,MentHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(PhysHlth,MentHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(PhysHlth,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(MentHlth,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + s(BMI, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HighBP, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HighChol, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=CholCheck, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Smoker, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Stroke, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Fruits, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Veggies, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Sex, k=4, bs='cs')
#selected select as True to do feature selection
bam_model_shrink <- bam(as.formula(formula_str),
                 data=df_3,
                 family=binomial(),
                 discrete=TRUE,
                 nthreads=nthreads,
                 select=TRUE,
                 method="fREML")

cat("\nModel Fit Complete.\n")
## 
## Model Fit Complete.
bam_model_shrink_summary<-summary(bam_model_shrink)
print(bam_model_shrink_summary)
## 
## Family: binomial 
## Link function: logit 
## 
## Formula:
## Diabetes_binary ~ SVI_scaled + s(BMI, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, k = 4, bs = "cs") + HighBP + 
##     HighChol + CholCheck + Smoker + Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + 
##     PhysActivity + Fruits + Veggies + HvyAlcoholConsump + DiffWalk + 
##     Sex + ti(BMI, Age, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, 
##     PhysHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, MentHlth, 
##     k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, GenHlth, k = c(5, 
##     4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(Age, PhysHlth, k = c(5, 5), 
##     bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(Age, MentHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", 
##     "cs")) + ti(Age, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + 
##     ti(PhysHlth, MentHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + 
##     ti(PhysHlth, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + 
##     ti(MentHlth, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + 
##     s(BMI, by = HighBP, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = HighChol, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = CholCheck, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(BMI, by = Smoker, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = Stroke, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = PhysActivity, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(BMI, by = Fruits, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = Veggies, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = DiffWalk, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, 
##     by = Sex, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = HighBP, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = HighChol, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, 
##     by = CholCheck, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = Smoker, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = Stroke, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, 
##     by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = PhysActivity, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = Fruits, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(Age, by = Veggies, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = DiffWalk, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(Age, by = Sex, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = HighBP, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = HighChol, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(PhysHlth, by = CholCheck, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = Smoker, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = Stroke, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = PhysActivity, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = Fruits, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(PhysHlth, by = Veggies, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = DiffWalk, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = Sex, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(MentHlth, by = HighBP, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = HighChol, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = CholCheck, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = Smoker, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(MentHlth, by = Stroke, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = PhysActivity, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = Fruits, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = Veggies, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(MentHlth, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = DiffWalk, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = Sex, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = HighBP, k = 4, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(GenHlth, by = HighChol, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, 
##     by = CholCheck, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = Smoker, 
##     k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = Stroke, k = 4, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(GenHlth, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 4, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(GenHlth, by = PhysActivity, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, 
##     by = Fruits, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = Veggies, 
##     k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 4, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = DiffWalk, k = 4, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(GenHlth, by = Sex, k = 4, bs = "cs")
## 
## Parametric coefficients:
##                        Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)           -3.530598   0.144315 -24.464  < 2e-16 ***
## SVI_scaled            -0.410494   0.026392 -15.554  < 2e-16 ***
## HighBP1                0.831019   0.098705   8.419  < 2e-16 ***
## HighChol1              0.676167   0.030558  22.128  < 2e-16 ***
## CholCheck1             1.073914   0.088972  12.070  < 2e-16 ***
## Smoker1               -0.005705   0.029891  -0.191  0.84865    
## Stroke1                0.321308   0.047919   6.705 2.01e-11 ***
## HeartDiseaseorAttack1  0.479512   0.041977  11.423  < 2e-16 ***
## PhysActivity1         -0.175941   0.085396  -2.060  0.03937 *  
## Fruits1                0.045708   0.026060   1.754  0.07944 .  
## Veggies1               0.021653   0.053003   0.409  0.68289    
## HvyAlcoholConsump1    -0.521849   0.055023  -9.484  < 2e-16 ***
## DiffWalk1              0.303405   0.037448   8.102 5.40e-16 ***
## Sex1                   0.087442   0.028441   3.074  0.00211 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Approximate significance of smooth terms:
##                                         edf Ref.df  Chi.sq  p-value    
## s(BMI)                            3.4691655      4 289.064  < 2e-16 ***

## s(PhysHlth)                       0.0021982      4   0.001 0.383393    
## s(MentHlth)                       0.0014906      4   0.000 0.941474

## s(GenHlth):HighBP1                1.9906519      3   8.576 3.68e-05 ***

## s(GenHlth):CholCheck1             0.0008324      3   0.000 0.564361    
## s(GenHlth):Smoker0                1.7910629      3  32.229  < 2e-16 ***
## s(GenHlth):Smoker1                0.0043120      3   0.003 0.056841 .

## s(GenHlth):Stroke1                1.9643680      3  11.256 0.000756 ***

## s(GenHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack1  2.1399624      3   8.213 3.07e-06 ***
## s(GenHlth):PhysActivity0          1.7174308      3   8.343 0.002077 ** 
## s(GenHlth):PhysActivity1          0.0232955      3   0.024 0.012485 *  
## s(GenHlth):Fruits0                0.0009734      3   0.000 0.747847    
## s(GenHlth):Fruits1                0.0018493      3   0.000 0.740581    
## s(GenHlth):Veggies0               0.0038640      3   0.003 0.304239    
## s(GenHlth):Veggies1               0.2468090      3   0.313 0.245178    
## s(GenHlth):HvyAlcoholConsump0     0.0019465      3   0.000 0.993941    
## s(GenHlth):HvyAlcoholConsump1     0.0011267      3   0.000 0.924956    
## s(GenHlth):DiffWalk0              2.1617519      3  42.773  < 2e-16 ***
## s(GenHlth):DiffWalk1              0.0075008      3   0.006 0.016075 *  
## s(GenHlth):Sex0                   2.3621616      3  25.446 1.53e-06 ***
## s(GenHlth):Sex1                   0.0047088      3   0.003 0.019244 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## R-sq.(adj) =  0.177   Deviance explained = 20.8%
## fREML = 2.5161e+05  Scale est. = 1         n = 202944
#add predicted prob to df
df_3$predicted_prob <- predict(bam_model_shrink, newdata=df_3, type="response")


compute_confusion <- function(y, p, thresh=0.5) {
  pred_class <- ifelse(p >= thresh, 1, 0)
  TP <- sum(pred_class==1 & y==1)
  FP <- sum(pred_class==1 & y==0)
  TN <- sum(pred_class==0 & y==0)
  FN <- sum(pred_class==0 & y==1)

  list(
    TP=TP, FP=FP, TN=TN, FN=FN,
    Sensitivity = TP/(TP+FN),
    Specificity = TN/(TN+FP),
    FPR = FP/(FP+TN),
    Precision = TP/(TP+FP),
    Accuracy = (TP+TN) / (TP+TN+FP+FN)
  )
}

perf <- compute_confusion(df_3[[outcome]], df_3$predicted_prob, thresh=0.3)
cat("\nConfusion Matrix metrics at threshold = 0.30:\n")
## 
## Confusion Matrix metrics at threshold = 0.30:
print(perf)
## $TP
## [1] 12920
## 
## $FP
## [1] 17439
## 
## $TN
## [1] 157226
## 
## $FN
## [1] 15359
## 
## $Sensitivity
## [1] 0.4568761
## 
## $Specificity
## [1] 0.9001574
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.09984256
## 
## $Precision
## [1] 0.425574
## 
## $Accuracy
## [1] 0.8383889
roc_obj <- roc(df_3[[outcome]], df_3$predicted_prob)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
cat("\nAUC:", round(auc(roc_obj), 3), "\n")
## 
## AUC: 0.818
calib_df <- df_3 %>%
  mutate(bin = cut(predicted_prob, breaks=seq(0,1,0.1))) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(mean_pred=mean(predicted_prob),
            mean_actual=mean(.data[[outcome]]),
            .groups="drop")

ggplot(calib_df, aes(x=mean_pred, y=mean_actual)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="red") +
  labs(title="Calibration Plot", x="Mean Predicted", y="Observed Diabetes Rate") +
  theme_minimal()

s_table <- bam_model_shrink_summary$s.table
edf_values <- s_table[, "edf"]
term_names <- rownames(s_table)

important_terms <- term_names[edf_values > 0.1]

cat("\nImportant GAM Terms (edf > 0.1):\n")
## 
## Important GAM Terms (edf > 0.1):
print(important_terms)
##  [1] "s(BMI)"                            "s(GenHlth)"                       
##  [3] "ti(BMI,Age)"                       "ti(BMI,MentHlth)"                 
##  [5] "ti(GenHlth,BMI)"                   "ti(Age,PhysHlth)"                 
##  [7] "ti(Age,MentHlth)"                  "ti(GenHlth,Age)"                  
##  [9] "ti(GenHlth,PhysHlth)"              "s(BMI):HighBP0"                   
## [11] "s(BMI):Smoker1"                    "s(BMI):PhysActivity1"             
## [13] "s(BMI):Veggies1"                   "s(Age):HighBP1"                   
## [15] "s(Age):HighChol0"                  "s(Age):Smoker0"                   
## [17] "s(Age):Stroke0"                    "s(Age):HeartDiseaseorAttack0"     
## [19] "s(Age):HvyAlcoholConsump1"         "s(Age):Sex1"                      
## [21] "s(PhysHlth):HighBP1"               "s(PhysHlth):HighChol1"            
## [23] "s(PhysHlth):CholCheck0"            "s(PhysHlth):Smoker1"              
## [25] "s(PhysHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack1" "s(PhysHlth):PhysActivity0"        
## [27] "s(PhysHlth):Fruits0"               "s(PhysHlth):DiffWalk1"            
## [29] "s(PhysHlth):Sex1"                  "s(MentHlth):HighChol0"            
## [31] "s(MentHlth):PhysActivity1"         "s(MentHlth):Fruits0"              
## [33] "s(MentHlth):Veggies0"              "s(MentHlth):DiffWalk0"            
## [35] "s(GenHlth):HighBP0"                "s(GenHlth):HighBP1"               
## [37] "s(GenHlth):CholCheck0"             "s(GenHlth):Smoker0"               
## [39] "s(GenHlth):Stroke1"                "s(GenHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack0" 
## [41] "s(GenHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack1"  "s(GenHlth):PhysActivity0"         
## [43] "s(GenHlth):Veggies1"               "s(GenHlth):DiffWalk0"             
## [45] "s(GenHlth):Sex0"
#Socioeconomic variables as separate with splines, interactions, and feature selection

df_3_b <- train_Diabetes_df
outcome <- "Diabetes_binary"
svi_var <- "SVI_scaled"

cont_var <- c("BMI", "Age", "PhysHlth", "MentHlth", "GenHlth","Income", "Education")
cat_var <- c("HighBP", "HighChol", "CholCheck", "Smoker",
             "Stroke", "HeartDiseaseorAttack", "PhysActivity",
             "Fruits", "Veggies", "HvyAlcoholConsump",
             "DiffWalk", "Sex", "NoDocbcCost_flipped","AnyHealthcare")

max_k_requested <- 5
nthreads <- 14

df_3_b[[outcome]] <- as.numeric(df_3_b[[outcome]])
if (!all(df_3_b[[outcome]] %in% c(0,1))) {
  df_3_b[[outcome]] <- ifelse(df_3_b[[outcome]] %in% c("Yes","Y","1","True","T"),1,0)
}

for (v in cat_var) df_3_b[[v]] <- as.factor(df_3_b[[v]])

cont_var_safe <- c()
var_k <- list()

for (v in cont_var) {
  nuniq <- length(unique(na.omit(df_3_b[[v]])))
  if (nuniq > 2) {
    k_safe <- min(max_k_requested, max(3, nuniq - 1))
    cont_var_safe <- c(cont_var_safe, v)
    var_k[[v]] <- k_safe
  } else {
    cat_var <- union(cat_var, v)
  }
}

cat("Spline variables & k:\n")
## Spline variables & k:
print(var_k)
## $BMI
## [1] 5
## 
## $Age
## [1] 5
## 
## $PhysHlth
## [1] 5
## 
## $MentHlth
## [1] 5
## 
## $GenHlth
## [1] 4
## 
## $Income
## [1] 5
## 
## $Education
## [1] 5
#no svi
terms_list <- c()

# spline main effects
for (v in cont_var_safe) {
  terms_list <- c(terms_list, paste0("s(", v, ", k=", var_k[[v]], ", bs='cs')"))
}

# factor main effects
terms_list <- c(terms_list, cat_var)

# continuous × continuous tensor interactions
interaction_terms_cc <- c()
if (length(cont_var_safe) > 1) {
  for (i in seq_len(length(cont_var_safe)-1)) {
    for (j in (i+1):length(cont_var_safe)) {
      v1 <- cont_var_safe[i]; v2 <- cont_var_safe[j]
      interaction_terms_cc <- c(
        interaction_terms_cc,
        paste0("ti(", v1, ",", v2, ", k=c(", var_k[[v1]], ",", var_k[[v2]], "), bs=c('cs','cs'))")
      )
    }
  }
}

# continuous × categorical interactions
interaction_terms_cg <- c()
for (v in cont_var_safe) {
  for (f in cat_var) {
    if (nlevels(df_3_b[[f]]) > 1) {
      interaction_terms_cg <- c(interaction_terms_cg,
                                paste0("s(", v, ", by=", f, ", k=", var_k[[v]], ", bs='cs')"))
    }
  }
}

all_terms <- c(terms_list, interaction_terms_cc, interaction_terms_cg)

formula_str <- paste0(outcome, " ~ ", paste(all_terms, collapse=" + "))
cat("\nFinal GAM Formula:\n")
## 
## Final GAM Formula:
cat(formula_str, "\n\n")
## Diabetes_binary ~ s(BMI, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, k=5, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, k=4, bs='cs') + s(Income, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, k=5, bs='cs') + HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + Smoker + Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + PhysActivity + Fruits + Veggies + HvyAlcoholConsump + DiffWalk + Sex + NoDocbcCost_flipped + AnyHealthcare + ti(BMI,Age, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,PhysHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,MentHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,Income, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,Education, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,PhysHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,MentHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,Income, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,Education, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(PhysHlth,MentHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(PhysHlth,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(PhysHlth,Income, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(PhysHlth,Education, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(MentHlth,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(MentHlth,Income, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(MentHlth,Education, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(GenHlth,Income, k=c(4,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(GenHlth,Education, k=c(4,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Income,Education, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + s(BMI, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HighBP, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HighChol, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=CholCheck, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Smoker, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Stroke, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Fruits, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Veggies, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Sex, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=AnyHealthcare, k=4, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5, bs='cs')
#select is set to True
bam_model_shrink_b <- bam(as.formula(formula_str),
                 data=df_3_b,
                 family=binomial(),
                 discrete=TRUE,
                 nthreads=nthreads,
                 select=TRUE,
                 method="fREML")

cat("\nModel Fit Complete.\n")
## 
## Model Fit Complete.
bam_model_shrink_b_summary<-summary(bam_model_shrink_b)
print(bam_model_shrink_b_summary)
## 
## Family: binomial 
## Link function: logit 
## 
## Formula:
## Diabetes_binary ~ s(BMI, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(PhysHlth, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(GenHlth, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(Income, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(Education, k = 5, bs = "cs") + HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + 
##     Smoker + Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + PhysActivity + Fruits + 
##     Veggies + HvyAlcoholConsump + DiffWalk + Sex + NoDocbcCost_flipped + 
##     AnyHealthcare + ti(BMI, Age, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + 
##     ti(BMI, PhysHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, 
##     MentHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, GenHlth, 
##     k = c(5, 4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, Income, k = c(5, 
##     5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, Education, k = c(5, 5), 
##     bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(Age, PhysHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", 
##     "cs")) + ti(Age, MentHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + 
##     ti(Age, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(Age, 
##     Income, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(Age, Education, 
##     k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(PhysHlth, MentHlth, 
##     k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(PhysHlth, GenHlth, 
##     k = c(5, 4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(PhysHlth, Income, k = c(5, 
##     5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(PhysHlth, Education, k = c(5, 
##     5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(MentHlth, GenHlth, k = c(5, 
##     4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(MentHlth, Income, k = c(5, 5), 
##     bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(MentHlth, Education, k = c(5, 5), 
##     bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(GenHlth, Income, k = c(4, 5), bs = c("cs", 
##     "cs")) + ti(GenHlth, Education, k = c(4, 5), bs = c("cs", 
##     "cs")) + ti(Income, Education, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", 
##     "cs")) + s(BMI, by = HighBP, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = HighChol, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = CholCheck, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(BMI, by = Smoker, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = Stroke, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = PhysActivity, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(BMI, by = Fruits, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = Veggies, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = DiffWalk, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, 
##     by = Sex, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = NoDocbcCost_flipped, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = AnyHealthcare, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(Age, by = HighBP, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = HighChol, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = CholCheck, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(Age, by = Smoker, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = Stroke, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = PhysActivity, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(Age, by = Fruits, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = Veggies, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = DiffWalk, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, 
##     by = Sex, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = NoDocbcCost_flipped, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = AnyHealthcare, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(PhysHlth, by = HighBP, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = HighChol, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = CholCheck, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = Smoker, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(PhysHlth, by = Stroke, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = PhysActivity, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = Fruits, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = Veggies, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(PhysHlth, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = DiffWalk, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = Sex, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = NoDocbcCost_flipped, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = AnyHealthcare, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = HighBP, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(MentHlth, by = HighChol, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = CholCheck, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = Smoker, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = Stroke, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(MentHlth, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(MentHlth, by = PhysActivity, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = Fruits, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = Veggies, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = DiffWalk, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(MentHlth, by = Sex, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = NoDocbcCost_flipped, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = AnyHealthcare, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = HighBP, k = 4, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(GenHlth, by = HighChol, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, 
##     by = CholCheck, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = Smoker, 
##     k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = Stroke, k = 4, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(GenHlth, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 4, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(GenHlth, by = PhysActivity, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, 
##     by = Fruits, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = Veggies, 
##     k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 4, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = DiffWalk, k = 4, bs = "cs") +
