## 
## R-sq.(adj) =  0.179   Deviance explained =   21%
## fREML = 2.5149e+05  Scale est. = 1         n = 202944
#add predicted prob to df
df_3_b$predicted_prob <- predict(bam_model_shrink_b, newdata=df_3_b, type="response")

compute_confusion <- function(y, p, thresh=0.5) {
  pred_class <- ifelse(p >= thresh, 1, 0)
  TP <- sum(pred_class==1 & y==1)
  FP <- sum(pred_class==1 & y==0)
  TN <- sum(pred_class==0 & y==0)
  FN <- sum(pred_class==0 & y==1)

  list(
    TP=TP, FP=FP, TN=TN, FN=FN,
    Sensitivity = TP/(TP+FN),
    Specificity = TN/(TN+FP),
    FPR = FP/(FP+TN),
    Precision = TP/(TP+FP),
    Accuracy = (TP+TN) / (TP+TN+FP+FN)
  )
}

perf <- compute_confusion(df_3_b[[outcome]], df_3_b$predicted_prob, thresh=0.3)
cat("\nConfusion Matrix metrics at threshold = 0.30:\n")
## 
## Confusion Matrix metrics at threshold = 0.30:
print(perf)
## $TP
## [1] 13032
## 
## $FP
## [1] 17497
## 
## $TN
## [1] 157168
## 
## $FN
## [1] 15247
## 
## $Sensitivity
## [1] 0.4608367
## 
## $Specificity
## [1] 0.8998254
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.1001746
## 
## $Precision
## [1] 0.4268728
## 
## $Accuracy
## [1] 0.838655
#ROC/AUC
roc_obj <- roc(df_3_b[[outcome]], df_3_b$predicted_prob)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
cat("\nAUC:", round(auc(roc_obj), 3), "\n")
## 
## AUC: 0.819
calib_df <- df_3_b %>%
  mutate(bin = cut(predicted_prob, breaks=seq(0,1,0.1))) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(mean_pred=mean(predicted_prob),
            mean_actual=mean(.data[[outcome]]),
            .groups="drop")

ggplot(calib_df, aes(x=mean_pred, y=mean_actual)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="red") +
  labs(title="Calibration Plot", x="Mean Predicted", y="Observed Diabetes Rate") +
  theme_minimal()

s_table <- bam_model_shrink_b_summary$s.table
edf_values <- s_table[, "edf"]
term_names <- rownames(s_table)

important_terms <- term_names[edf_values > 0.1]

cat("\nImportant GAM Terms (edf > 0.1):\n")
## 
## Important GAM Terms (edf > 0.1):
print(important_terms)
##  [1] "s(BMI)"                            "s(GenHlth)"                       
##  [3] "s(Income)"                         "ti(BMI,Age)"                      
##  [5] "ti(BMI,MentHlth)"                  "ti(GenHlth,BMI)"                  
##  [7] "ti(BMI,Income)"                    "ti(BMI,Education)"                
##  [9] "ti(Age,PhysHlth)"                  "ti(Age,MentHlth)"                 
## [11] "ti(GenHlth,Age)"                   "ti(Age,Income)"                   
## [13] "ti(Age,Education)"                 "ti(PhysHlth,MentHlth)"            
## [15] "ti(GenHlth,PhysHlth)"              "ti(MentHlth,Income)"              
## [17] "ti(MentHlth,Education)"            "ti(GenHlth,Income)"               
## [19] "ti(GenHlth,Education)"             "ti(Income,Education)"             
## [21] "s(BMI):HighBP0"                    "s(BMI):Smoker1"                   
## [23] "s(BMI):Fruits0"                    "s(BMI):Veggies1"                  
## [25] "s(BMI):DiffWalk0"                  "s(BMI):Sex0"                      
## [27] "s(BMI):AnyHealthcare1"             "s(Age):HighBP1"                   
## [29] "s(Age):HighChol0"                  "s(Age):Stroke1"                   
## [31] "s(Age):HeartDiseaseorAttack1"      "s(Age):PhysActivity1"             
## [33] "s(Age):Fruits1"                    "s(Age):HvyAlcoholConsump0"        
## [35] "s(Age):Sex1"                       "s(Age):AnyHealthcare0"            
## [37] "s(PhysHlth):HighBP1"               "s(PhysHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack1"
## [39] "s(PhysHlth):PhysActivity0"         "s(PhysHlth):Fruits0"              
## [41] "s(PhysHlth):DiffWalk1"             "s(PhysHlth):Sex1"                 
## [43] "s(PhysHlth):NoDocbcCost_flipped1"  "s(MentHlth):HighChol1"            
## [45] "s(MentHlth):PhysActivity0"         "s(MentHlth):Fruits0"              
## [47] "s(MentHlth):Veggies0"              "s(MentHlth):NoDocbcCost_flipped0" 
## [49] "s(MentHlth):AnyHealthcare0"        "s(GenHlth):HighBP1"               
## [51] "s(GenHlth):CholCheck0"             "s(GenHlth):Smoker0"               
## [53] "s(GenHlth):Stroke1"                "s(GenHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack1" 
## [55] "s(GenHlth):PhysActivity1"          "s(GenHlth):DiffWalk0"             
## [57] "s(GenHlth):Sex0"                   "s(GenHlth):NoDocbcCost_flipped1"  
## [59] "s(Income):HighChol1"               "s(Income):CholCheck0"             
## [61] "s(Income):Smoker0"                 "s(Income):Stroke0"                
## [63] "s(Income):Sex0"                    "s(Education):Smoker0"             
## [65] "s(Education):Stroke0"              "s(Education):Fruits1"             
## [67] "s(Education):Sex0"                 "s(Education):AnyHealthcare0"
#SVI with splines, interactions, feature selection, and weighting diabetics to equal non-diabetics

library(mgcv)
library(dplyr)
library(pROC)
library(ggplot2)

df_a <- train_Diabetes_df

#to find inverse weights for diabetics and non-diabetics
p_diabetes <- mean(df_a$Diabetes_binary == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
p_nodiabetes <- mean(df_a$Diabetes_binary == 0, na.rm = TRUE)

df_a$obs_weight <- ifelse(
  df_a$Diabetes_binary == 1,
  1/p_diabetes,
  1/p_nodiabetes
)
outcome <- "Diabetes_binary"
svi_var <- "SVI_scaled"

cont_var <- c("BMI", "Age", "PhysHlth", "MentHlth", "GenHlth")
cat_var <- c("HighBP", "HighChol", "CholCheck", "Smoker",
             "Stroke", "HeartDiseaseorAttack", "PhysActivity",
             "Fruits", "Veggies", "HvyAlcoholConsump",
             "DiffWalk", "Sex")

max_k_requested <- 5
nthreads <- 14

df_a[[outcome]] <- as.numeric(df_a[[outcome]])
if (!all(df_a[[outcome]] %in% c(0,1))) {
  df_a[[outcome]] <- ifelse(df_a[[outcome]] %in% c("Yes","Y","1","True","T"),1,0)
}

for (v in cat_var) df_a[[v]] <- as.factor(df_a[[v]])

#which continuous vars have enough unique values
cont_var_safe <- c()
var_k <- list()

for (v in cont_var) {
  nuniq <- length(unique(na.omit(df_a[[v]])))
  if (nuniq > 2) {
    k_safe <- min(max_k_requested, max(3, nuniq - 1))
    cont_var_safe <- c(cont_var_safe, v)
    var_k[[v]] <- k_safe
  } else {
    cat_var <- union(cat_var, v)
  }
}

cat("Spline variables & k:\n")
## Spline variables & k:
print(var_k)
## $BMI
## [1] 5
## 
## $Age
## [1] 5
## 
## $PhysHlth
## [1] 5
## 
## $MentHlth
## [1] 5
## 
## $GenHlth
## [1] 4
terms_list <- c(svi_var)

# spline main effects
for (v in cont_var_safe) {
  terms_list <- c(terms_list, paste0("s(", v, ", k=", var_k[[v]], ", bs='cs')"))
}

# factor main effects
terms_list <- c(terms_list, cat_var)

# continuous × continuous tensor interactions
interaction_terms_cc <- c()
if (length(cont_var_safe) > 1) {
  for (i in seq_len(length(cont_var_safe)-1)) {
    for (j in (i+1):length(cont_var_safe)) {
      v1 <- cont_var_safe[i]; v2 <- cont_var_safe[j]
      interaction_terms_cc <- c(
        interaction_terms_cc,
        paste0("ti(", v1, ",", v2, ", k=c(", var_k[[v1]], ",", var_k[[v2]], "), bs=c('cs','cs'))")
      )
    }
  }
}

# continuous × categorical interactions
interaction_terms_cg <- c()
for (v in cont_var_safe) {
  for (f in cat_var) {
    if (nlevels(df_a[[f]]) > 1) {
      interaction_terms_cg <- c(interaction_terms_cg,
                                paste0("s(", v, ", by=", f, ", k=", var_k[[v]], ", bs='cs')"))
    }
  }
}

all_terms <- c(terms_list, interaction_terms_cc, interaction_terms_cg)

formula_str <- paste0(outcome, " ~ ", paste(all_terms, collapse=" + "))
cat("\nFinal GAM Formula:\n")
## 
## Final GAM Formula:
cat(formula_str, "\n\n")
## Diabetes_binary ~ SVI_scaled + s(BMI, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, k=5, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, k=4, bs='cs') + HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + Smoker + Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + PhysActivity + Fruits + Veggies + HvyAlcoholConsump + DiffWalk + Sex + ti(BMI,Age, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,PhysHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,MentHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,PhysHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,MentHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(PhysHlth,MentHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(PhysHlth,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(MentHlth,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + s(BMI, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HighBP, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HighChol, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=CholCheck, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Smoker, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Stroke, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Fruits, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Veggies, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Sex, k=4, bs='cs')
#select=true and weights set to the weights created previously
bam_model_shrink_weight <- bam(as.formula(formula_str),
                 data=df_a,
                 family=binomial(),
                 discrete=TRUE,
                 nthreads=nthreads,
                 select=TRUE,
                 weights= obs_weight,
                 method="fREML")
## Warning in eval(family$initialize): non-integer #successes in a binomial glm!
cat("\nModel Fit Complete.\n")
## 
## Model Fit Complete.
bam_model_shrink_weight_summary<-summary(bam_model_shrink_weight)
print(bam_model_shrink_weight_summary)
## 
## Family: binomial 
## Link function: logit 
## 
## Formula:
## Diabetes_binary ~ SVI_scaled + s(BMI, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, k = 4, bs = "cs") + HighBP + 
##     HighChol + CholCheck + Smoker + Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + 
##     PhysActivity + Fruits + Veggies + HvyAlcoholConsump + DiffWalk + 
##     Sex + ti(BMI, Age, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, 
##     PhysHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, MentHlth, 
##     k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, GenHlth, k = c(5, 
##     4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(Age, PhysHlth, k = c(5, 5), 
##     bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(Age, MentHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", 
##     "cs")) + ti(Age, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + 
##     ti(PhysHlth, MentHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + 
##     ti(PhysHlth, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + 
##     ti(MentHlth, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + 
##     s(BMI, by = HighBP, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = HighChol, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = CholCheck, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(BMI, by = Smoker, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = Stroke, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = PhysActivity, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(BMI, by = Fruits, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = Veggies, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = DiffWalk, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, 
##     by = Sex, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = HighBP, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = HighChol, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, 
##     by = CholCheck, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = Smoker, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = Stroke, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, 
##     by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = PhysActivity, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = Fruits, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(Age, by = Veggies, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = DiffWalk, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(Age, by = Sex, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = HighBP, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = HighChol, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(PhysHlth, by = CholCheck, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = Smoker, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = Stroke, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = PhysActivity, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = Fruits, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(PhysHlth, by = Veggies, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, 
##     by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = DiffWalk, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(PhysHlth, by = Sex, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(MentHlth, by = HighBP, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = HighChol, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = CholCheck, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = Smoker, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(MentHlth, by = Stroke, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = PhysActivity, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = Fruits, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = Veggies, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(MentHlth, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, 
##     by = DiffWalk, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, by = Sex, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = HighBP, k = 4, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(GenHlth, by = HighChol, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, 
##     by = CholCheck, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = Smoker, 
##     k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = Stroke, k = 4, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(GenHlth, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 4, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(GenHlth, by = PhysActivity, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, 
##     by = Fruits, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = Veggies, 
##     k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = HvyAlcoholConsump, k = 4, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(GenHlth, by = DiffWalk, k = 4, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(GenHlth, by = Sex, k = 4, bs = "cs")
## 
## Parametric coefficients:
##                       Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)           -1.60160    0.14302 -11.198  < 2e-16 ***
## SVI_scaled            -0.45249    0.01367 -33.097  < 2e-16 ***
## HighBP1                0.91835    0.06367  14.423  < 2e-16 ***
## HighChol1              0.82026    0.06289  13.044  < 2e-16 ***
## CholCheck1             0.93068    0.11360   8.192 2.56e-16 ***
## Smoker1                0.03300    0.02824   1.169 0.242550    
## Stroke1                0.35823    0.03227  11.102  < 2e-16 ***
## HeartDiseaseorAttack1  0.82411    0.09311   8.851  < 2e-16 ***
## PhysActivity1         -0.28490    0.06478  -4.398 1.09e-05 ***
## Fruits1                0.03293    0.03027   1.088 0.276590    
## Veggies1              -0.01214    0.05219  -0.233 0.816086    
## HvyAlcoholConsump1    -1.42147    0.27341  -5.199 2.00e-07 ***
## DiffWalk1              0.29828    0.07831   3.809 0.000140 ***
## Sex1                   0.21926    0.06499   3.374 0.000742 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Approximate significance of smooth terms:
##                                         edf Ref.df  Chi.sq  p-value    
## s(BMI)                             2.210817      4   9.388 1.14e-06 ***
## s(Age)                             0.005214      4   0.002 0.474360    
## s(PhysHlth)                        0.003130      4   0.001 0.437388    
## s(MentHlth)                        0.007148      4   0.002 0.418079    
## s(GenHlth)                         1.101131      3   1.898 7.00e-06 ***
## ti(BMI,Age)                       10.803636     16 269.881  < 2e-16 ***
## ti(BMI,PhysHlth)                   3.533601     16  12.258 0.001978 ** 
## ti(BMI,MentHlth)                   3.280415     16  13.436 0.000228 ***
## ti(GenHlth,BMI)                    6.030577     12  48.754  < 2e-16 ***
## ti(Age,PhysHlth)                   4.177901     16  33.995  < 2e-16 ***
## ti(Age,MentHlth)                  10.556779     16  60.773  < 2e-16 ***
## ti(GenHlth,Age)                    8.648728     12 227.337  < 2e-16 ***
## ti(PhysHlth,MentHlth)              0.188073     16   0.201 0.317396    
## ti(GenHlth,PhysHlth)               8.899091     12 124.252  < 2e-16 ***
## ti(GenHlth,MentHlth)               8.000484     12  43.565  < 2e-16 ***
## s(BMI):HighBP0                     2.547679      4  21.726 6.99e-07 ***
## s(BMI):HighBP1                     0.013216      4   0.009 0.014537 *  
## s(BMI):HighChol0                   1.849914      4   4.083 2.09e-05 ***
## s(BMI):HighChol1                   1.515575      4   2.524 7.05e-05 ***
## s(BMI):CholCheck0                  0.017630      4   0.012 0.166968    
## s(BMI):CholCheck1                  0.791445      4   2.238 0.060333 .  
## s(BMI):Smoker0                     0.026391      4   0.022 0.110632

## s(MentHlth):Veggies1               0.007088      4   0.003 0.384927

## s(MentHlth):Sex1                   0.010740      4   0.007 0.414243    
## s(GenHlth):HighBP0                 0.023692      3   0.020 0.000962 ***
## s(GenHlth):HighBP1                 2.718367      3  87.084  < 2e-16 ***
## s(GenHlth):HighChol0               0.002550      3   0.000 0.979040    
## s(GenHlth):HighChol1               0.003892      3   0.000 0.990926    
## s(GenHlth):CholCheck0              1.190954      3   6.035 0.007760 ** 
## s(GenHlth):CholCheck1              0.006330      3   0.003 0.205839    
## s(GenHlth):Smoker0                 2.403436      3  95.199  < 2e-16 ***
## s(GenHlth):Smoker1                 0.012303      3   0.010 0.007422 ** 
## s(GenHlth):Stroke0                 0.019375      3   0.015 0.002585 ** 
## s(GenHlth):Stroke1                 2.520432      3  45.042  < 2e-16 ***
## s(GenHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack0   1.635985      3   3.681 5.34e-07 ***
## s(GenHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack1   2.503594      3  14.264  < 2e-16 ***
## s(GenHlth):PhysActivity0           2.353610      3  29.530  < 2e-16 ***
## s(GenHlth):PhysActivity1           0.018548      3   0.016 0.005919 ** 
## s(GenHlth):Fruits0                 2.651278      3  16.214 5.08e-05 ***
## s(GenHlth):Fruits1                 0.017518      3   0.013 0.002491 ** 
## s(GenHlth):Veggies0                0.016952      3   0.013 0.102029    
## s(GenHlth):Veggies1                1.135435      3   5.258 0.008966 ** 
## s(GenHlth):HvyAlcoholConsump0      0.007145      3   0.004 0.257796    
## s(GenHlth):HvyAlcoholConsump1      0.900491      3   2.715 0.051944 .  
## s(GenHlth):DiffWalk0               2.509564      3  71.110  < 2e-16 ***
## s(GenHlth):DiffWalk1               0.041134      3   0.037 0.003460 ** 
## s(GenHlth):Sex0                    2.867979      3  63.939  < 2e-16 ***
## s(GenHlth):Sex1                    0.010678      3   0.008 0.000424 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## R-sq.(adj) =  0.268   Deviance explained = 25.2%
## fREML = 3.9729e+05  Scale est. = 1         n = 202944
#assign predicted_prob to df
df_a$predicted_prob <- predict(bam_model_shrink_weight, newdata=df_a, type="response")

compute_confusion <- function(y, p, thresh=0.5) {
  pred_class <- ifelse(p >= thresh, 1, 0)
  TP <- sum(pred_class==1 & y==1)
  FP <- sum(pred_class==1 & y==0)
  TN <- sum(pred_class==0 & y==0)
  FN <- sum(pred_class==0 & y==1)

  list(
    TP=TP, FP=FP, TN=TN, FN=FN,
    Sensitivity = TP/(TP+FN),
    Specificity = TN/(TN+FP),
    FPR = FP/(FP+TN),
    Precision = TP/(TP+FP),
    Accuracy = (TP+TN) / (TP+TN+FP+FN)
  )
}

perf <- compute_confusion(df_a[[outcome]], df_a$predicted_prob, thresh=0.3)
cat("\nConfusion Matrix metrics at threshold = 0.30:\n")
## 
## Confusion Matrix metrics at threshold = 0.30:
print(perf)
## $TP
## [1] 26024
## 
## $FP
## [1] 87141
## 
## $TN
## [1] 87524
## 
## $FN
## [1] 2255
## 
## $Sensitivity
## [1] 0.9202588
## 
## $Specificity
## [1] 0.5010964
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.4989036
## 
## $Precision
## [1] 0.2299651
## 
## $Accuracy
## [1] 0.5595041
#ROC/AUC
roc_obj <- roc(df_a[[outcome]], df_a$predicted_prob)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
cat("\nAUC:", round(auc(roc_obj), 3), "\n")
## 
## AUC: 0.818
#calibration
calib_df <- df_a %>%
  mutate(bin = cut(predicted_prob, breaks=seq(0,1,0.1))) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(mean_pred=mean(predicted_prob),
            mean_actual=mean(.data[[outcome]]),
            .groups="drop")

ggplot(calib_df, aes(x=mean_pred, y=mean_actual)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="red") +
  labs(title="Calibration Plot", x="Mean Predicted", y="Observed Diabetes Rate") +
  theme_minimal()

s_table <- bam_model_shrink_weight_summary$s.table
edf_values <- s_table[, "edf"]
term_names <- rownames(s_table)

important_terms <- term_names[edf_values > 0.1]

cat("\nImportant GAM Terms (edf > 0.1):\n")
## 
## Important GAM Terms (edf > 0.1):
print(important_terms)
##  [1] "s(BMI)"                            "s(GenHlth)"                       
##  [3] "ti(BMI,Age)"                       "ti(BMI,PhysHlth)"                 
##  [5] "ti(BMI,MentHlth)"                  "ti(GenHlth,BMI)"                  
##  [7] "ti(Age,PhysHlth)"                  "ti(Age,MentHlth)"                 
##  [9] "ti(GenHlth,Age)"                   "ti(PhysHlth,MentHlth)"            
## [11] "ti(GenHlth,PhysHlth)"              "ti(GenHlth,MentHlth)"             
## [13] "s(BMI):HighBP0"                    "s(BMI):HighChol0"                 
## [15] "s(BMI):HighChol1"                  "s(BMI):CholCheck1"                
## [17] "s(BMI):Smoker1"                    "s(BMI):HeartDiseaseorAttack0"     
## [19] "s(BMI):PhysActivity1"              "s(BMI):Fruits0"                   
## [21] "s(BMI):Veggies1"                   "s(BMI):HvyAlcoholConsump1"        
## [23] "s(BMI):DiffWalk0"                  "s(BMI):Sex0"                      
## [25] "s(Age):HighBP1"                    "s(Age):HighChol0"                 
## [27] "s(Age):CholCheck0"                 "s(Age):Smoker0"                   
## [29] "s(Age):Stroke0"                    "s(Age):HeartDiseaseorAttack1"     
## [31] "s(Age):PhysActivity0"              "s(Age):Fruits0"                   
## [33] "s(Age):HvyAlcoholConsump1"         "s(Age):DiffWalk1"                 
## [35] "s(Age):Sex1"                       "s(PhysHlth):HighBP1"              
## [37] "s(PhysHlth):CholCheck0"            "s(PhysHlth):Smoker1"              
## [39] "s(PhysHlth):Stroke0"               "s(PhysHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack1"
## [41] "s(PhysHlth):PhysActivity0"         "s(PhysHlth):Fruits0"              
## [43] "s(PhysHlth):Veggies0"              "s(PhysHlth):HvyAlcoholConsump0"   
## [45] "s(PhysHlth):DiffWalk1"             "s(PhysHlth):Sex1"                 
## [47] "s(MentHlth):HighBP0"               "s(MentHlth):HighChol0"            
## [49] "s(MentHlth):HighChol1"             "s(MentHlth):CholCheck0"           
## [51] "s(MentHlth):Smoker0"               "s(MentHlth):PhysActivity1"        
## [53] "s(MentHlth):Fruits0"               "s(MentHlth):Veggies0"             
## [55] "s(MentHlth):DiffWalk1"             "s(GenHlth):HighBP1"               
## [57] "s(GenHlth):CholCheck0"             "s(GenHlth):Smoker0"               
## [59] "s(GenHlth):Stroke1"                "s(GenHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack0" 
## [61] "s(GenHlth):HeartDiseaseorAttack1"  "s(GenHlth):PhysActivity0"         
## [63] "s(GenHlth):Fruits0"                "s(GenHlth):Veggies1"              
## [65] "s(GenHlth):HvyAlcoholConsump1"     "s(GenHlth):DiffWalk0"             
## [67] "s(GenHlth):Sex0"
#Socioeconomic variables as independent with splines, interactions, feature selection, and weighting diabetics to equal non-diabetics

df_a_b <- train_Diabetes_df

#weights
p_diabetes <- mean(df_a_b$Diabetes_binary == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
p_nodiabetes <- mean(df_a_b$Diabetes_binary == 0, na.rm = TRUE)

df_a_b$obs_weight <- ifelse(
  df_a_b$Diabetes_binary == 1,
  1 / p_diabetes,
  1 / p_nodiabetes
)
outcome <- "Diabetes_binary"
#svi_var <- "SVI_scaled"

cont_var <- c("BMI", "Age", "PhysHlth", "MentHlth", "GenHlth","Income", "Education")
cat_var <- c("HighBP", "HighChol", "CholCheck", "Smoker",
             "Stroke", "HeartDiseaseorAttack", "PhysActivity",
             "Fruits", "Veggies", "HvyAlcoholConsump",
             "DiffWalk", "Sex", "NoDocbcCost_flipped","AnyHealthcare")

max_k_requested <- 5
nthreads <- 14

df_a_b[[outcome]] <- as.numeric(df_a_b[[outcome]])
if (!all(df_a_b[[outcome]] %in% c(0,1))) {
  df_a_b[[outcome]] <- ifelse(df_a_b[[outcome]] %in% c("Yes","Y","1","True","T"),1,0)
}


for (v in cat_var) df_a_b[[v]] <- as.factor(df_a_b[[v]])

#which continuous vars have enough unique values
cont_var_safe <- c()
var_k <- list()

for (v in cont_var) {
  nuniq <- length(unique(na.omit(df_a_b[[v]])))
  if (nuniq > 2) {
    k_safe <- min(max_k_requested, max(3, nuniq - 1))
    cont_var_safe <- c(cont_var_safe, v)
    var_k[[v]] <- k_safe
  } else {
    cat_var <- union(cat_var, v)
  }
}

cat("Spline variables & k:\n")
## Spline variables & k:
print(var_k)
## $BMI
## [1] 5
## 
## $Age
## [1] 5
## 
## $PhysHlth
## [1] 5
## 
## $MentHlth
## [1] 5
## 
## $GenHlth
## [1] 4
## 
## $Income
## [1] 5
## 
## $Education
## [1] 5
#no svi var
terms_list <- c()

# spline main effects
for (v in cont_var_safe) {
  terms_list <- c(terms_list, paste0("s(", v, ", k=", var_k[[v]], ", bs='cs')"))
}

# factor main effects
terms_list <- c(terms_list, cat_var)

# continuous × continuous tensor interactions
interaction_terms_cc <- c()
if (length(cont_var_safe) > 1) {
  for (i in seq_len(length(cont_var_safe)-1)) {
    for (j in (i+1):length(cont_var_safe)) {
      v1 <- cont_var_safe[i]; v2 <- cont_var_safe[j]
      interaction_terms_cc <- c(
        interaction_terms_cc,
        paste0("ti(", v1, ",", v2, ", k=c(", var_k[[v1]], ",", var_k[[v2]], "), bs=c('cs','cs'))")
      )
    }
  }
}

# continuous × categorical interactions
interaction_terms_cg <- c()
for (v in cont_var_safe) {
  for (f in cat_var) {
    if (nlevels(df_a_b[[f]]) > 1) {
      interaction_terms_cg <- c(interaction_terms_cg,
                                paste0("s(", v, ", by=", f, ", k=", var_k[[v]], ", bs='cs')"))
    }
  }
}

all_terms <- c(terms_list, interaction_terms_cc, interaction_terms_cg)

formula_str <- paste0(outcome, " ~ ", paste(all_terms, collapse=" + "))
cat("\nFinal GAM Formula:\n")
## 
## Final GAM Formula:
cat(formula_str, "\n\n")
## Diabetes_binary ~ s(BMI, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, k=5, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, k=4, bs='cs') + s(Income, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, k=5, bs='cs') + HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + Smoker + Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + PhysActivity + Fruits + Veggies + HvyAlcoholConsump + DiffWalk + Sex + NoDocbcCost_flipped + AnyHealthcare + ti(BMI,Age, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,PhysHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,MentHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,Income, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(BMI,Education, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,PhysHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,MentHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,Income, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Age,Education, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(PhysHlth,MentHlth, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(PhysHlth,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(PhysHlth,Income, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(PhysHlth,Education, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(MentHlth,GenHlth, k=c(5,4), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(MentHlth,Income, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(MentHlth,Education, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(GenHlth,Income, k=c(4,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(GenHlth,Education, k=c(4,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + ti(Income,Education, k=c(5,5), bs=c('cs','cs')) + s(BMI, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5, bs='cs') + s(BMI, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Age, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5, bs='cs') + s(PhysHlth, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, + s(MentHlth, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5, bs='cs') + s(MentHlth, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HighBP, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HighChol, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=CholCheck, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Smoker, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Stroke, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=PhysActivity, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Fruits, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Veggies, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=DiffWalk, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=Sex, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=4, bs='cs') + s(GenHlth, by=AnyHealthcare, k=4, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Income, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=HighBP, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=HighChol, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=CholCheck, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=Smoker, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=Stroke, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=HeartDiseaseorAttack, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=PhysActivity, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=Fruits, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=Veggies, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=HvyAlcoholConsump, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=DiffWalk, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=Sex, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=NoDocbcCost_flipped, k=5, bs='cs') + s(Education, by=AnyHealthcare, k=5, bs='cs')
bam_model_shrink_weight_b <- bam(as.formula(formula_str),
                 data=df_a_b,
                 family=binomial(),
                 discrete=TRUE,
                 nthreads=nthreads,
                 select=TRUE,
                 weights= obs_weight,
                 method="fREML")
## Warning in eval(family$initialize): non-integer #successes in a binomial glm!
cat("\nModel Fit Complete.\n")
## 
## Model Fit Complete.
bam_model_shrink_weight_b_summary<-summary(bam_model_shrink_weight_b)
print(bam_model_shrink_weight_b_summary)
## 
## Family: binomial 
## Link function: logit 
## 
## Formula:
## Diabetes_binary ~ s(BMI, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(PhysHlth, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(MentHlth, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(GenHlth, k = 4, bs = "cs") + s(Income, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(Education, k = 5, bs = "cs") + HighBP + HighChol + CholCheck + 
##     Smoker + Stroke + HeartDiseaseorAttack + PhysActivity + Fruits + 
##     Veggies + HvyAlcoholConsump + DiffWalk + Sex + NoDocbcCost_flipped + 
##     AnyHealthcare + ti(BMI, Age, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + 
##     ti(BMI, PhysHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, 
##     MentHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, GenHlth, 
##     k = c(5, 4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, Income, k = c(5, 
##     5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(BMI, Education, k = c(5, 5), 
##     bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(Age, PhysHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", 
##     "cs")) + ti(Age, MentHlth, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + 
##     ti(Age, GenHlth, k = c(5, 4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(Age, 
##     Income, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(Age, Education, 
##     k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(PhysHlth, MentHlth, 
##     k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(PhysHlth, GenHlth, 
##     k = c(5, 4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(PhysHlth, Income, k = c(5, 
##     5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(PhysHlth, Education, k = c(5, 
##     5), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(MentHlth, GenHlth, k = c(5, 
##     4), bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(MentHlth, Income, k = c(5, 5), 
##     bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(MentHlth, Education, k = c(5, 5), 
##     bs = c("cs", "cs")) + ti(GenHlth, Income, k = c(4, 5), bs = c("cs",

##     "cs")) + ti(Income, Education, k = c(5, 5), bs = c("cs", 
##     "cs")) + s(BMI, by = HighBP, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = HighChol, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = CholCheck, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(BMI, by = Smoker, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(BMI, by = Stroke,

##     s(Age, by = HighBP, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = HighChol, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = CholCheck, k = 5, bs = "cs") + 
##     s(Age, by = Smoker, k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = Stroke, 
##     k = 5, bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = HeartDiseaseorAttack, k = 5, 
##     bs = "cs") + s(Age, by = PhysActivity, k = 5, bs = "cs") +

## s(Education):Veggies1               0.005106      4   0.000 0.841748    
## s(Education):HvyAlcoholConsump0     0.006336      4   0.000 0.971263    
## s(Education):HvyAlcoholConsump1     0.006272      4   0.000 0.948431    
## s(Education):DiffWalk0              0.011063      4   0.005 0.502793    
## s(Education):DiffWalk1              0.004293      4   0.002 0.495812

## s(Education):Sex1                   1.205348      4   9.768 0.000444 ***
## s(Education):NoDocbcCost_flipped0   0.003582      4   0.000 0.962471    
## s(Education):NoDocbcCost_flipped1   0.004917      4   0.000 0.982005    
## s(Education):AnyHealthcare0         0.003021      4   0.001 0.550754    
## s(Education):AnyHealthcare1         2.264678      4  15.834 0.000121 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## R-sq.(adj) =  0.271   Deviance explained = 25.6%
## fREML = 3.9665e+05  Scale est. = 1         n = 202944
df_a_b$predicted_prob <- predict(bam_model_shrink_weight_b, newdata=df_a_b, type="response")

compute_confusion <- function(y, p, thresh=0.5) {
  pred_class <- ifelse(p >= thresh, 1, 0)
  TP <- sum(pred_class==1 & y==1)
  FP <- sum(pred_class==1 & y==0)
  TN <- sum(pred_class==0 & y==0)
  FN <- sum(pred_class==0 & y==1)

  list(
    TP=TP, FP=FP, TN=TN, FN=FN,
    Sensitivity = TP/(TP+FN),
    Specificity = TN/(TN+FP),
    FPR = FP/(FP+TN),
    Precision = TP/(TP+FP),
    Accuracy = (TP+TN) / (TP+TN+FP+FN)
  )
}

perf <- compute_confusion(df_a_b[[outcome]], df_a_b$predicted_prob, thresh=0.3)
cat("\nConfusion Matrix metrics at threshold = 0.30:\n")
## 
## Confusion Matrix metrics at threshold = 0.30:
print(perf)
## $TP
## [1] 26006
## 
## $FP
## [1] 86769
## 
## $TN
## [1] 87896
## 
## $FN
## [1] 2273
## 
## $Sensitivity
## [1] 0.9196223
## 
## $Specificity
## [1] 0.5032262
## 
## $FPR
## [1] 0.4967738
## 
## $Precision
## [1] 0.2306008
## 
## $Accuracy
## [1] 0.5612484
#ROC/AUC
roc_obj <- roc(df_a_b[[outcome]], df_a_b$predicted_prob)
## Setting levels: control = 0, case = 1
## Setting direction: controls < cases
cat("\nAUC:", round(auc(roc_obj), 3), "\n")
## 
## AUC: 0.82
#calibration
calib_df <- df_a_b %>%
  mutate(bin = cut(predicted_prob, breaks=seq(0,1,0.1))) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(mean_pred=mean(predicted_prob),
            mean_actual=mean(.data[[outcome]]),
            .groups="drop")

ggplot(calib_df, aes(x=mean_pred, y=mean_actual)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept=0, linetype="dashed", color="red") +
  labs(title="Calibration Plot", x="Mean Predicted", y="Observed Diabetes Rate") +
  theme_minimal()

s_table <- bam_model_shrink_weight_b_summary$s.table
edf_values <- s_table[, "edf"]
term_names <- rownames(s_table)

important_terms <- term_names[edf_values > 0.1]

cat("\nImportant GAM Terms (edf > 0.1):\n")
## 
## Important GAM Terms (edf > 0.1):
print(important_terms)
##   [1] "s(GenHlth)"                         "ti(BMI,Age)"                       
##   [3] "ti(BMI,PhysHlth)"                   "ti(BMI,MentHlth)"                  
##   [5] "ti(GenHlth,BMI)"                    "ti(BMI,Income)"                    
##   [7] "ti(BMI,Education)"                  "ti(Age,PhysHlth)"                  
##   [9] "ti(Age,MentHlth)"                   "ti(GenHlth,Age)"

## [111] "s(Education):AnyHealthcare1"
